name: Stench
romDesc: Attacks gain +10% flinch chance. Chance is rolled separately on multi-hit attacks. Toxic Terrain turns do not decrease while the user is present.
shortDesc: 10% chance to flinch targets. Toxic terrain is permanent.

name: Drizzle
romDesc: Drizzle summons rain weather when the Pokemon enters battle, lasting 8 turns (12 with Damp Rock held). Rain boosts Water moves by 50% and cuts Fire damage by 50%. Certain moves and abilities have special interactions with rain. Cannot override primal weather conditions.
shortDesc: Summons rain on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Speed Boost
romDesc: User's Speed increases by one stage at end of each full turn they remain on the field. Doesn't activate on the turn the user is switched in.
shortDesc: Raises own Speed by one stage after every turn.

name: Battle Armor
romDesc: Incoming damage is reduced by 20% (x0.8), multiplicative with other damage reduction. Additionally, critical hits are blocked, functioning as regular hits and not activating on-crit effects like To The Bone's bleed.
shortDesc: Immune to critical hits. Takes 20% less damage from attacks.

name: Sturdy
romDesc: When at full HP, this Pokemon will survive any single attack with at least 1 HP remaining. This functions like a Focus Sash, and so does not protect against multihit attacks or follow-up attacks (e.g. Aftershock, Thundercall).
shortDesc: At full HP, cannot be KO in one hit, stays at 1 HP instead.

name: Damp
romDesc: If the user makes contact with another Pokemon, offensively or defensively, the other Pokemon's type is changed to pure Water. This happens immediately for multihit or priority moves and can remove STAB in the middle of an enemy's multihit move.
shortDesc: Makes foe Water-type on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Limber
romDesc: All recoil damage to the user is halved; this includes moves with scaling recoil damage like Brave Bird, moves with crash damage like Jump Kick, or moves with fixed recoil like Steel Beam. Paralysis also cannot affect the user, and if they gain Limber, existing paralysis is cured.
shortDesc: Para immune, takes half recoil, immune to self stat drops.

name: Sand Veil
romDesc: During sandstorm, enemy Pokemon's accuracy is divided by 1.25, and user is immune to sand damage. Bypassed by No Guard/Mold Breaker.
shortDesc: Evasion is boosted by 1.25x while a sandstorm is active.

name: static.name
romDesc: Has a chance to paralyze when attacking or when hit by a move. Has a 10% chance to paralyze on non-contact attacks and a 30% chance to paralyze on contact attacks.
shortDesc: 30% chance to paralyze on contact, 10% on non-contact.

name: Volt Absorb
romDesc: This Pokemon absorbs Electric- type moves completely, converting them into energy that restores 25% of its maximum HP. Provides complete immunity to Electric damage and effects like paralysis from Thunder Wave. Absolutely perfect for Water/Flying types to remove their 4x Electric weakness.
shortDesc: Heals 25% of max HP when hit by an Electric-type move.

name: Water Absorb
romDesc: The user gains immunity to Water-type moves and they heal for 25% of their max HP when hit by them.
shortDesc: Heals 25% of max HP when hit by a Water-type move.

name: Oblivious
romDesc: This Pokemon is immune to infatuation, Scare, Intimidate and Taunt. When gaining this ability while afflicted by any of the mentioned statuses, instantly cures them.
shortDesc: Immune to infatuation, Scare, Intimidate and Taunt.

name: Cloud Nine
romDesc: Cloud Nine clears all weather upon switch-in and nullifies weather effects (including Primal weathers) while the user remains on the field. Weather can still be set, but provides no damage boosts or ability triggers until the user switches out.
shortDesc: Clears weather and prevents its effects.

name: Compound Eyes
romDesc: Boosts the user's accuracy by 1.3x.
shortDesc: Grants a 1.3x accuracy boost.

name: Insomnia
romDesc: Prevents falling asleep by any means, including sleep moves, abilities like Yawn, and other effects that cause sleep status. Rest will fail completely when used. If gained while asleep (via Worry Seed/Skill Swap), immediately wakes up. Can be bypassed by Mold Breaker and similar abilities. TEST
shortDesc: Cannot fall asleep. Rest fails if used.

name: Color Change
romDesc: Transforms the user into the best defensive type before taking damage. Prioritizes immunities over resistances. Only changes to a pure type. Once per turn.
shortDesc: Changes type to a resist or an immunity before getting hit.

name: Immunity
romDesc: Prevents poisoning. Reduces all Poison-type damage by 50%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction. If poisoned when gaining this ability, the poison is immediately cured.
shortDesc: Cannot be poisoned. Halves damage taken from Poison moves.

name: Flash Fire
romDesc: Flash Fire grants complete immunity to Fire-type moves. When hit by Fire attacks, powers up the user's Fire moves by 50% until switching out. The boost doesn't stack from multiple Fire hits.
shortDesc: Powers up Fire-type moves by 1.5x if hit by a Fire-type move.

name: Shield Dust
romDesc: Blocks all secondary effects from damaging moves. Grants immunity to entry hazards. Blocks all powder moves including Sleep Powder, Stun Spore, Poison Powder, Spore, Cotton Spore, Rage Powder, Powder, and Magic Powder.
shortDesc: Immune to added move effects, hazards, and powder moves.

name: Own Tempo
romDesc: Grants immunity to confusion, Intimidate, and Scare. Immediately cures confusion when receiving this ability.
shortDesc: Immune to confusion, Intimidate and Scare.

name: Suction Cups
romDesc: Prevents forced switching from moves and Red Card.
shortDesc: Cannot be forced to switch out by an enemy's move.

name: Intimidate
romDesc: Upon entering battle, the user drops the Attack stat of all opposing Pokemon by one stage.
shortDesc: Lowers foes' Atk by one stage on entry.

name: Shadow Tag
romDesc: Prevents all non-Shadow Tag or Ghost-type foes from switching out. Pokemon holding Shed Shell or using a pivot move such as Flip Turn can escape. Activates during the next turn if the user switches in mid battle.
shortDesc: Opponents can't be switched out. Ghosts aren't affected.

name: Rough Skin
romDesc: Damages attackers using contact moves for 1/8 of their max HP. Activates on every hit for multihitting moves.
shortDesc: Enemies lose 1/8 of max HP if they use a contact move.

name: Wonder Guard
romDesc: Only super-effective attacks or indirect damage can hurt the user. All other direct attacks deal zero damage. Other sources such as poison or ability damage still function as normal.
shortDesc: Is only hit by Super-effective attacks or indirect damage.

name: Levitate
romDesc: The user is immune to Ground- type moves and other ground effects such as Spikes and terrains. Boosts the damage of Flying-type moves by 25%.
shortDesc: Immune to Ground-type moves. Ups own Flying moves by 1.25x.

name: Effect Spore
romDesc: When hit by a contact move, 30% chance to inflict sleep, paralysis, or poison. Chosen randomly.
shortDesc: 30% chance to inflict SLP, PARA or PSN if hit by a contact move.

name: Synchronize
romDesc: When inflicted with a non- volatile status (except sleep), the attacker receives the same status. Bypasses Substitute. If the user can cure the status when it is inflicted, they will inflict the status to the attacker before curing it.
shortDesc: Enemies inflicting status on this Pokémon get same status.

name: Clear Body
romDesc: Gives immunity to all stat reductions from moves and abilities. Includes self stat drops from moves like Overheat.
shortDesc: Immune to stat drops.

name: Natural Cure
romDesc: Cures all status conditions when switching out.
shortDesc: Heals status condition upon switching out.

name: Lightning Rod
romDesc: The user draws in Electric-type moves and gains immunity to them. Additionally, Electric-type moves boost the highest attacking stat of the user by one stage.
shortDesc: Redirects Electric moves. Absorbs them, ups highest Atk.

name: Serene Grace
romDesc: Doubles the activation chance of the user's secondary effects on their attacks.
shortDesc: Doubles chance of secondary effects on its own moves.

name: Swift Swim
romDesc: Boosts Speed by 50% during rain.
shortDesc: This Pokémon's Speed gets a 1.5x boost if rain is active.

name: Chlorophyll
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed by 50% during sun.
shortDesc: This Pokémon's Speed gets a 1.5x boost if sun is active.

name: Illuminate
romDesc: Boosts the user's accuracy by 1.2x. Removes Ghost-typing on target when landing an attack.
shortDesc: Grants a 1.2x accuracy boost.

name: Trace
romDesc: Copies the ability of an opposing Pokemon when entering battle, replacing itself in the current ability slot. Cannot copy Trace, Wonder Guard, and most form related abilities. In doubles, targets the first valid opponent at random.
shortDesc: Copies the foe's ability. Does not copy innates.

name: Huge Power
romDesc: Increases the user's Attack stat by 2x. Multiplicative with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: Doubles own Attack stat. Boosts raw stat, not base stat.

name: Poison Point
romDesc: Has a 30% chance to inflict poison on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked.
shortDesc: 30% chance to poison on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Inner Focus
romDesc: Focus Blast never misses. Unaffected by flinch, Intimidate, or Scare.
shortDesc: Blocks flinch, Intimidate, Scare. Focus Blast never misses.

name: Magma Armor
romDesc: Immune to frostbite. Reduces damage received from Water and Ice-type moves by 30%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Frostbite-immune. Takes 30% less dmg from Water/Ice-type moves.

name: Water Veil
romDesc: Uses Aqua Ring on entry, which restores 1/16 HP each turn. Grants immunity to burn status and removes burn on switching in.
shortDesc: Burn-immune. Casts Aqua Ring on entry.

name: Magnet Pull
romDesc: Prevents Steel-type Pokemon from switching out while the user is present. Ghost-types are immune to this effect. Pokemon holding Shed Shell or using a pivot move such as Flip Turn can escape. Activates during the next turn if the user switches in mid battle.
shortDesc: Traps opposing Steel-types. Ghosts aren't affected.

name: Soundproof
romDesc: Grants immunity to sound-based moves. Self-targeting sound moves are not blocked.
shortDesc: Immune to sound-based moves.

name: Rain Dish
romDesc: Restores 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn in rain.
shortDesc: Heals 1/8 of max HP every turn if rain is active.

name: Sand Stream
romDesc: Summons a Sandstorm for 8 turns (12 with Smooth Rock) on entry. Damages non-Rock/Ground/Steel types by 1/16 HP per turn. Rock- types gain a 50% Special Defense boost. Halves the effectiveness of sun related moves.
shortDesc: Summons a sandstorm on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Pressure
romDesc: Doubles PP usage of opposing moves and clears all positive stat stages on entry.
shortDesc: Doubles foe's PP usage. Clears stat buffs on entry.

name: Thick Fat
romDesc: Reduces damage received from Fire and Ice-type moves by 50%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 1/2 damage from Fire-type and Ice-type attacks.

name: Early Bird
romDesc: Allows the user to wake up from sleep twice as fast. Subtract 2 sleep turns every turn instead of 1.
shortDesc: Awakens twice as fast from sleep.

name: Flame Body
romDesc: Contact with this Pokemon has a 30% chance to inflict burn. Non- contact has a 20% chance. Works offensively and defensively.
shortDesc: 30% chance to burn on contact, 20% non. Also works on offense.

name: Run Away
romDesc: Guarantees successful escape from wild Pokemon battles regardless of speed differences. When any of the user's stats are lowered by an opponent's move or ability, raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.
shortDesc: Guarantees fleeing. Raises Speed if stats lowered by an enemy.

name: Keen Eye
romDesc: Prevents accuracy stat stage drops. All moves gain a 1.2x accuracy boost.
shortDesc: Immune to accuracy drops. Grants a 1.2x accuracy boost.

name: Hyper Cutter
romDesc: Hyper Cutter prevents enemies from lowering the user's Attack stat through moves or abilities. All contact moves used by this Pokemon have their critical hit rate increased by one stage.
shortDesc: Enemies can't lower Atk/SpAtk. Contact moves get +1 Crit.

name: Pickup
romDesc: Clears all entry hazards from your side of the field when entering battle. The Pokemon is still susceptible to hazards while clearing them.
shortDesc: Removes all hazards on entry. Not immune to hazards.

name: Truant
romDesc: Prevents consecutive attacking moves. After using an attack, the user must loaf around next turn and cannot attack. Status moves remain unaffected.
shortDesc: Can't use attacking moves twice in a row.

name: Hustle
romDesc: Boosts the power of attacks by 1.4x but reduces their accuracy by 10%. Only affects non-status moves.
shortDesc: 0.9x accuracy. Boosts damage by 1.4x.

name: Cute Charm
romDesc: When hit by making contact (offensively or defensively), has a 50% chance to infatuate the attacker (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half). This only works on Pokemon of the opposite gender.
shortDesc: 50% chance to attract on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Plus
romDesc: Doubles the Pokemon's offensive power when partnered with an ally that has Plus or Minus.
shortDesc: Deals double damage if an ally Pokémon has Minus or Plus.

name: Minus
romDesc: Doubles the Pokemon's offensive power when partnered with an ally that has Minus or Plus.
shortDesc: Deals double damage if an ally Pokémon has Minus or Plus.

name: Forecast
romDesc: Changes form and type to match active weather. When using weather setting moves, follows up with Weather Ball (100 BP, Special, matching type with set weather). Transforms on entry, weather changes, and turn end. Unsuppressable ability that works even under Mold Breaker effects.
shortDesc: Changes form with the weather. Attacks when setting weather.

name: Sticky Hold
romDesc: The user's item cannot be forcibly removed or stolen.
shortDesc: Can't lose its item.

name: Shed Skin
romDesc: At the end of each turn, there's a 30% chance for the user to cure status conditions afflicted on them.
shortDesc: 30% chance to heal its status condition at the end of a turn.

name: Guts
romDesc: Boosts Attack stat by 50% when suffering from any status condition. Negates the Attack drop from burn status.
shortDesc: Ups Atk by 1.5x if suffering from a status condition.

name: Marvel Scale
romDesc: Increases base Defense by 50% when afflicted with any status condition.
shortDesc: Ups Def by 1.5x when statused.

name: Liquid Ooze
romDesc: Liquid Ooze reverses all healing effects from drain moves, causing the attacker to take damage instead. Affects Absorb, Drain Punch, Giga Drain, Leech Life, and similar draining attacks. The damage equals what would have been healed. Perfect counter to healing-based strategies.
shortDesc: Draining causes harm to enemies instead of healing them.

name: Overgrow
romDesc: Boosts the power of Grass-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Grass-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Blaze
romDesc: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Fire-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Torrent
romDesc: Boosts the power of Water-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Water-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Swarm
romDesc: Boosts the power of Bug-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Bug-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Rock Head
romDesc: Prevents all recoil damage from the user's moves and abilities. Also grants immunity to enrage recoil damage. Does not prevent crash damage or Explosion/Self- Destruct damage.
shortDesc: Immune to recoil damage, but not immune to Explosion/crash dmg.

name: Drought
romDesc: Summons harsh sunlight for 8 turns (12 with Heat Rock) on entry. Boosts Fire moves by 50%, reduces Water moves by 50%. Activates extra effects on sun related moves.
shortDesc: Summons sun on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Arena Trap
romDesc: Prevents all non-levitating or Ghost-type foes from switching out. Pokemon holding Shed Shell or using a pivot move such as Flip Turn can escape. Activates during the next turn if the user switches in mid battle
shortDesc: Enemies can't flee. Ghosts and ungrounded Pokémon are immune.

name: Vital Spirit
romDesc: Immune to sleep. When the Pokemon uses a Fighting-type move, it heals all status conditions immediately after the move resolves. Removes sleep when gained.
shortDesc: Can't fall asleep. Fighting-type moves heal status.

name: White Smoke
romDesc: Sets Smokescreen on entry, lasting 3 turns. Smokescreen increases the evasiveness of your party by 25%.
shortDesc: Sets Smokescreen for 3 turns on switch-in.

name: Pure Power
romDesc: Increases the user's Attack stat by 2x. Multiplicative with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: Doubles own Sp.Atk stat. Boosts raw stat, not base stat.

name: Shell Armor
romDesc: Incoming damage is reduced by 20% (x0.8), multiplicative with other damage reduction. Additionally, critical hits are blocked, functioning as regular hits and not activating on-crit effects like To The Bone's bleed.
shortDesc: Immune to critical hits. Takes 20% less damage from attacks.

name: Air Lock
romDesc: Sets Tailwind for 3 turns and clears all weather effects on entry. Primal weathers are suppressed. Weather can still be set while the user is on the field, but will have no effect until the user switches.
shortDesc: Cloud Nine + Air Blower.

name: Tangled Feet
romDesc: When the user is confused or enraged, the Pokemon uses its Speed stat instead of Defense or Special Defense for damage calculations. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Uses Speed as defensive stat when confused or enraged.

name: Motor Drive
romDesc: Immune to Electric-type moves, and boost Speed by 1 stage when the user is hit by them. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Boosts Speed instead of being hit by Electric-type moves.

name: Rivalry
romDesc: Boosts the user's damage by 25% against same-gender Pokemon and reduces damage taken by 25% from opposite-gender Pokemon. No effect with genderless Pokemon.
shortDesc: Deals 1.25x to same gender. Takes .75x from opposite gender.

name: Steadfast
romDesc: Getting flinched raises Speed by one stage.
shortDesc: Raises Speed by one stage if this Pokémon flinches.

name: Snow Cloak
romDesc: Evasion is boosted by 1.25x under hail.
shortDesc: Evasion is boosted by 1.25x under hail.

name: Gluttony
romDesc: Berries that normally activate at 1/4 HP trigger at 1/2 HP instead. Additionally, after consuming any berry, the user recovers 1/3 of max HP. Does not include berries consumed through moves like Pluck.
shortDesc: Eats berries early. Berries also restore 1/3 of max HP.

name: Anger Point
romDesc: When hit, raises the user's Attack by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Getting hit raises Atk by +1. Critical hits maximize Attack.

name: Unburden
romDesc: When consuming or losing a held item, the user's base Speed stat is multiplied by x2. Boost goes away when switching out, gaining a new item, or upon losing the ability.
shortDesc: Consuming its held item doubles Speed until switched out.

name: Heatproof
romDesc: Halves damage from Fire-type moves. Immune to burn damage and Attack drops from burn status.
shortDesc: Halves damage taken from Fire-type moves. Takes no burn damage.

name: Simple
romDesc: Doubles all stat changes on this Pokémon.
shortDesc: Doubles all stat changes on this Pokémon.

name: Dry Skin
romDesc: The user heals 25% HP from Water-type moves and 12.5% HP each turn in rain. Takes 25% more damage from Fire moves and loses 12.5% HP per turn in sun.
shortDesc: Water/Rain heals. Fire/Sun hurts.

name: Download
romDesc: When switching in, if the foe's Defense is higher than Special Defense, raise Special Attack by one stage. If Special Defense is higher or equal, raise Attack by one stage.
shortDesc: Raises Atk/Sp. Atk by one stage depending on opponent.

name: Iron Fist
romDesc: Boosts the power of punching moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of punching moves by 1.3x.

name: Poison Heal
romDesc: Restores 1/8 max HP per turn instead of taking damage when poisoned. Works with both regular poison and toxic poison. Also prevents damage from Toxic terrain.
shortDesc: Restores 1/8 of max HP after each turn if poisoned.

name: Adaptability
romDesc: Boosts STAB damage boost on moves from 1.5x to 2.0x damage.
shortDesc: Increases STAB from 1.5x to 2x.

name: Skill Link
romDesc: Multihit moves to always hit 5 times. For moves that only hit 3 times or Population Bomb, there will be one accuracy check for all hits instead of individual checks for each hit.
shortDesc: Multi-hit moves always hit the maximum number of times.

name: Hydration
romDesc: During rain, cures all status conditions at the end of the turn.
shortDesc: Cures own status at the end of every turn in rain.

name: Solar Power
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's highest attacking stat by 50% during sun.
shortDesc: Ups highest attacking stat by 1.5x in sun.

name: Quick Feet
romDesc: Boosts Speed stat by 50% when suffering from any status condition. Negates the Speed drop from paralysis status.
shortDesc: Ups Speed by 1.5x if suffering from a status condition.

name: Normalize
romDesc: Converts all damaging moves to Normal-type and grants a 10% power boost. Normal-type moves bypass resistances, but not immunities.
shortDesc: Its moves become Normal-type, get 1.1x boost, ignore resists.

name: Sniper
romDesc: Boosts critical hit damage from 1.5x to 2.25x by applying an additional 50% multiplier.
shortDesc: Critical hits have a 2.25x dmg multiplier instead of 1.5x.

name: Magic Guard
romDesc: Grants immunity to all non- attack damage sources including entry hazards, weather damage, status conditions, and recoil.
shortDesc: Only damaged by attacks.

name: No Guard
romDesc: Guarantees hits for all moves used by and against the user.
shortDesc: Attacks used by and on this Pokémon bypass accuracy checks.

name: Stall
romDesc: Reduces damage by 30% if the user has not moved yet. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources. Works when the user switches in mid-turn.
shortDesc: Takes 30% less damage if it hasn't moved yet.

name: Technician
romDesc: Boosts moves with 60 BP or less by 1.5x. Does not boost moves with 60 BP or less if they potentially can have more than 60 BP, such as Revenge or Venoshock.
shortDesc: Moves with 60 BP or less get a 1.5x boost.

name: Leaf Guard
romDesc: During sun, cures all status conditions at the end of the turn.
shortDesc: Cures own status at the end of every turn in sun.

name: Klutz (N)
romDesc: Disables all held item effects. Items can still be knocked off or stolen but give no benefits. Item-based moves like Fling fail. Mega Stones bypass this restriction.
shortDesc: Own held item has no effect. Mega Stones are unaffected.

name: Mold Breaker
romDesc: Allows moves to ignore the target's abilities and innates that interfere with effects or reduce damage. Does not bypass abilities that modify base stats such as Grass Pelt.
shortDesc: Moves hit through abilities. Also affects innates.

name: Super Luck
romDesc: Adds +1 to the critical hit stage of all the Pokemon's damaging moves.
shortDesc: Raises critical-hit ratio of own moves by +1.

name: Aftermath
romDesc: Uses a 100 BP Explosion or Outburst (whichever is higher) when knocked out. Using explosion moves will always Flinch the target.
shortDesc: After fainting uses 100 BP Explosion or Outburst.

name: Anticipation
romDesc: Alerts the Pokemon when facing opponents with super-effective moves on switch-in. Dodge the first super effective hit received in battle.
shortDesc: Senses Super-effective moves. Dodges one Super-effective hit.

name: Forewarn
romDesc: Casts an 80 BP Future Sight on the opposing Pokemon when switching in. Strikes 2 turns later, bypassing substitutes and other protections. The attack cannot miss once initiated and ignores accuracy checks. This cannot target the same Pokemon twice.
shortDesc: Casts an 80 BP Future Sight on entry.

name: Unaware
romDesc: Ignores all the foes' stat stage changes during damage calculations.
shortDesc: Ignores foes' stat changes, both positive and negative ones.

name: Tinted Lens
romDesc: Doubles damage when attacking into resistances. If a move would be resisted (0.5x damage or less), the damage is multiplied by 2x.
shortDesc: Attacks deal double damage if resisted.

name: Filter
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 35% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Slow Start
romDesc: Halves Attack, Special Attack, and Speed for the first 5 turns after switching in. The turn counter resets each time the Pokemon switches out.
shortDesc: Halves Offenses and Speed during the first 5 turns out.

name: Scrappy
romDesc: The user can land Normal and Fighting-type moves on Ghost- types for neutral damage. Grants immunity to Intimidate and Scare.
shortDesc: Normal/Fighting can hit Ghosts. Immune to Intimidate/Scare.

name: Storm Drain
romDesc: The user draws in Water-type moves and gains immunity to them. Additionally, Water-type moves boost the highest attacking stat of the user by one stage.
shortDesc: Redirects Water moves. Absorbs them, ups highest Atk.

name: Ice Body
romDesc: Restores 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn in hail. Also grants immunity to hail damage.
shortDesc: Heals 1/8 of max HP every turn in hail.

name: Solid Rock
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 35% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Snow Warning
romDesc: Summons hailstorm for 8 turns (12 with Icy Rock) on entry. Damages non-Ice types by 1/16 HP per turn. Boosts the Defense stat of Ice-type Pokemon by 50%. Halves the effectiveness of sun related moves.
shortDesc: Summons hail on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Honey Gather
romDesc: Has a 50% chance to get Honey each turn if it had no item. Honey heals 1/16 HP per turn and can be eaten in a pinch to heal 1/4 HP. Works even if the user didn't start with Honey as its item.
shortDesc: Has a 50% chance to find Honey each turn.

name: Frisk
romDesc: Upon entering battle, reveals the opponents' items and prevents them from working for 2 turns. Does not prevent Mega Stones and other similar items from working.
shortDesc: Checks foes' item and disables their items for two turns.

name: Reckless
romDesc: Increases the damage of moves that cause recoil by 20%. This bonus also applies when moves gain recoil through other means, such as madness or abilities.
shortDesc: Moves causing recoil damage deal 1.2x more damage.

name: Multitype
romDesc: The user changes form based of the type of Plate they are currently holding. Plates cannot be removed, and Multitype cannot be overridden, suppressed, swapped, or copied in any way.
shortDesc: Held Plate item decides holder's type.

name: Flower Gift
romDesc: During sun, boost base Special Attack and Special Defense by 50% for this Pokemon and all allies.
shortDesc: Increases the party's SpAtk and SpDef by 1.5x in Sun.

name: Bad Dreams
romDesc: All sleeping opponents lose 25% of their max HP at the end of each turn.
shortDesc: Sleeping Pokémon lose 1/4 of max HP at the end of each turn.

name: Pickpocket
romDesc: The user steals the target's held item on contact if they are currently holding no item. Does not work with Mega Stones and other similar items.
shortDesc: Steals the foe's held item on contact.

name: Sheer Force
romDesc: Removes most beneficial secondary effects after landing attacks in exchange for a 1.3x boost. Notably prevents Life Orb recoil when using these moves. Removable effects include reducing the target's stats, increasing the user's stats, inflicting status on a target and flinching.
shortDesc: Exchanges added effects on its moves for 1.3x more power.

name: Contrary
romDesc: Reverses all stat changes affecting this Pokemon. Works with self-inflicted changes.
shortDesc: Stat raises turn into stat drops for this Pokémon and vice versa.

name: Unnerve
romDesc: Prevents all opposing Pokemon from consuming held items.
shortDesc: Foes can't use consumable items.

name: Defiant
romDesc: When the user has their stats lowered by another Pokemon, they raise their Attack by 2 stages.
shortDesc: Raises Attack by two stages if stats are lowered by an enemy.

name: Defeatist
romDesc: Halves both Attack and Special Attack stats when HP drops below 33% of maximum. Deactivates after healing above this threshold.
shortDesc: Halves Atk and Sp. Atk stats if user is below 1/3 of max HP.

name: Cursed Body
romDesc: The user has a 30% chance to disable the attacker's move for 4 turns when hit by contact moves. The disabled move cannot be selected until the effect wears off.
shortDesc: 30% chance to disable moves if enemy makes contact.

name: Healer
romDesc: Gives a 30% chance to cure status conditions at the end of each turn for both the user and their ally if they are out in a double battle. Makes 2 separate checks for each Pokemon.
shortDesc: 30% chance to heal user or ally's status at the end of each turn.

name: Friend Guard
romDesc: In a double battle, the user's ally receives 50% less damage. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: Reduces damage that ally takes by 50% in double battles.

name: Weak Armor
romDesc: When hit by a contact move, raises the user's Speed by 2 stages and lowers their defense by 1 stage. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: If hit by a contact attack: -1 Defense and +2 Speed.

name: Heavy Metal
romDesc: Takes half damage from Ghost and Dark-type attacks. Doubles the Pokemon's weight, which affects some moves.
shortDesc: Take half damage from Ghost and Dark.

name: Light Metal
romDesc: Light Metal halves the Pokemon's weight and boosts their Speed stat by 30%. Makes weight-based attacks such as Low Kick deal less damage against this Pokemon. However, it also decreases damage from the user's Heavy Slam and similar weight- based moves.
shortDesc: Boosts Speed by 1.3x and halves this Pokémon's weight.

name: Multiscale
romDesc: Reduces all incoming damage by 50% when the Pokemon is at max HP. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: At full HP, halves damage taken from attacks

name: Toxic Boost
romDesc: Increases the Pokemon's Attack stat by 50% when poisoned (regular or badly poisoned). Immediately applies poison to user when in Toxic Terrain, regardless of them being grounded or not. Nullifies poison damage.
shortDesc: Ups Atk by 1.5x if poisoned. Immune to Poison status damage.

name: Flare Boost
romDesc: Raises the Pokemon's Special Attack stat by 50% when burned. Negates burn damage. Immediately applies burn to self in fog.
shortDesc: Ups Sp. Atk by 1.5x if burned. Ignites in fog.

name: Harvest
romDesc: 50% chance to restore berry on turn end, 100% in sun. Includes berries that were used for Fling, Natural Gift, or eaten.
shortDesc: 50% chance to recycle a used Berry every turn, 100% in sun.

name: Telepathy
romDesc: Protects the Pokemon from all damage-dealing moves used by its allies in double battles.
shortDesc: Protects team from friendly fire.

name: Moody
romDesc: At the end of each turn, randomly selects one stat to raise by 2 stages and another different stat to lower by 1 stage.
shortDesc: Sharply raises one stat and lowers another each turn.

name: Overcoat
romDesc: Provides immunity to weather damage from Sandstorm and Hail, and blocks all powder moves including Sleep Powder, Stun Spore, Poison Powder, Spore, Cotton Spore, Rage Powder, Powder, and Magic Powder. Also reduces incoming special damage by 20%. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: Blocks weather dmg and powders. Takes -20% special damage.

name: Poison Touch
romDesc: Has a 30% chance to inflict poison on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked.
shortDesc: 30% chance to poison on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Regenerator
romDesc: Restores 33% of maximum HP when switching out. This heal is not blocked by Heal Block.
shortDesc: Heals 1/3 of max HP upon switching out.

name: Big Pecks
romDesc: Boosts the power of contact moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of contact moves by 1.3x.

name: Sand Rush
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat by 50% in sand. Also grants immunity to sandstorm damage.
shortDesc: This Pokémon's Speed gets a 1.5x boost in a sandstorm.

name: Wonder Skin
romDesc: Immune to all damage boosting ability effects from opponents, other than Parental Bond and Multi-Headed.
shortDesc: Blocks most damage boosting and multihit abilities.

name: Analytic
romDesc: When the user moves after the target, boosts attack power by 30%.
shortDesc: Attacks get a 1.3x power boost if it moves last.

name: Illusion (N)
romDesc: Makes the Pokemon appear as the last alive party member. Boosts the user's damage by 30% until the illusion breaks.
shortDesc: Appears as last party slot and boosts power by 1.3x until hit.

name: Imposter
romDesc: Transforms the Pokemon into the opponent upon switching in. Copies their appearance, stats (minus HP), types, abilities, moves, and stat changes. Each copied move has 5 PP. Cannot transform if the target has Substitute, is already transformed, has Illusion active, or is semi-invulnerable.
shortDesc: Transforms into the foe on entry.

name: Infiltrator
romDesc: Allows moves to bypass the effects of screens, Safeguard, Mist, and Substitute.
shortDesc: Own moves bypass Substitutes and damage reduction screens.

name: Mummy
romDesc: When the user receives a contact move from another Pokemon who does not have this ability, it replaces their current ability with Mummy.
shortDesc: If hit, makes the attacker's ability Mummy.

name: Moxie
romDesc: Boosts the user's Attack by one stage whenever it knocks out an opponent with a direct hit.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO raises Attack by one stage.

name: Justified
romDesc: Immune to Dark-type moves, and boost Attack by 1 stage when the user is hit by them.
shortDesc: Boosts Attack instead of being hit by Dark-type moves.

name: Rattled
romDesc: Boosts Speed by one stage when hit by Bug, Dark, or Ghost-type moves or when the user flinches. Activates multiple times against multihit moves.
shortDesc: If hit by Bug, Dark or Ghost move, or flinches: +1 Speed.

name: Magic Bounce
romDesc: Reflects most status moves back to the user before they can take effect. The bounced move targets the original user with no additional accuracy check. Does not reflect moves that were already reflected.
shortDesc: Bounces back the effect of status moves to their user.

name: Sap Sipper
romDesc: Immune to Grass-type moves, and boost highest attacking stat by 1 stage when the user is hit by them.
shortDesc: Redirects Grass moves. Absorbs them, ups highest Atk.

name: Prankster
romDesc: Status moves gain +1 priority. Status moves fail when directly targeting opposing Dark-type Pokemon.
shortDesc: Status moves have +1 priority but fail on opposing Dark-types.

name: Sand Force
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's highest attacking stat by 50% in sand. Immune to sandstorm damage.
shortDesc: Ups highest attacking stat by 1.5x in sand.

name: Iron Barbs
romDesc: Enemies lose 1/8 of max HP if they use a contact move.
shortDesc: Enemies lose 1/8 of max HP if they use a contact move.

name: Zen Mode
romDesc: Triggers form change upon battle entry.
shortDesc: Transforms into Zen Mode on entry until end of battle.

name: Victory Star
romDesc: Boosts the user's and their ally's accuracy by 1.2x when active in a double battle.
shortDesc: Gives 1.2x accuracy boost to its own and its allies' moves.

name: Turboblaze
romDesc: Allows moves to ignore the target's abilities and innates that interfere with effects or reduce damage. Does not bypass abilities that modify base stats such as Grass Pelt. Adds Fire to the user's typing. Retains Fire typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Moves hit through abilities. Adds Fire type to itself.

name: Teravolt
romDesc: Allows moves to ignore the target's abilities and innates that interfere with effects or reduce damage. Does not bypass abilities that modify base stats such as Grass Pelt. Adds Electric to the user's typing. Retains Electric typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Moves hit through abilities. Adds Electric type to itself.

name: Aroma Veil
romDesc: Protects the user and allies from infatuation, heal block effects, and disabling moves including Disable, Taunt, Encore, and Torment.
shortDesc: Protects team from infatuation, heal block, and disabling.

name: Flower Veil
romDesc: Prevents all status conditions and stat reductions for Grass- type allies.
shortDesc: Protects Grass-type allies from status and stat drops.

name: Cheek Pouch
romDesc: No effect.
shortDesc: This ability has no effect.

name: Protean
romDesc: Before each attack, the user overrides their type to match the move's type.  Activates once per turn.
shortDesc: Changes type depending on the move it's about to use.

name: Fur Coat
romDesc: Halves all incoming Attack damage. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Halves damage taken by Physical moves. Does NOT double Defense.

name: Magician
romDesc: The user steals the target's held item when landing a non-contact move if they are currently holding no item. Does not work with Mega Stones and other similar items.
shortDesc: Steals the foe's held item after using a non-contact move.

name: Bulletproof
romDesc: Provides immunity to ball, bomb, and projectile moves. Includes Acid Spray, Rock Wrecker, Pollen Puff, and Barrage.
shortDesc: Immune to projectile, ball, or bomb-based moves.

name: Competitive
romDesc: When the user has their stats lowered by another Pokemon, they raise their Special Attack by 2 stages.
shortDesc: Raises Sp. Atk by two stages if stats are lowered by an enemy.

name: Strong Jaw
romDesc: Boosts the power of biting and fang moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of bite/fang moves by 1.3x.

name: Refrigerate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Ice-type. If the user is Ice-type its Ice-type moves have a 10% frostbite chance, otherwise it gains Ice STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Ice. Ice moves are empowered.

name: Sweet Veil (P)
romDesc: Provides sleep immunity to both the user and their ally in double battles.
shortDesc: This Pokémon and its ally are immune to sleep.

name: Stance Change
romDesc: Changes Aegislash's form based on moves used. Shield form switches to Blade when using damaging moves. Blade switches to Shield with King's Shield. Redux forms swap between physical/special based on move type. Unsuppressable. Form changes occur before attacks execute.
shortDesc: Turns into Blade or Shield form depending on move used.

name: Gale Wings
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to Flying- type moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: Flying-type moves get +1 priority at full HP.

name: Mega Launcher
romDesc: Boosts pulse, beam, ball, and aura moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts Beam/Pump/Cannon/Shot/ Gun/Pulse, etc. moves by 1.3x.

name: Grass Pelt
romDesc: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 50% when in Grassy Terrain.
shortDesc: This Pokémon's Defense gets a 1.5x boost in Grassy Terrain.

name: Symbiosis (N)
romDesc: Transfers the holder's item to an ally immediately after that ally consumes or uses up their held item.
shortDesc: Passes own item to its ally if said ally consumes its item.

name: Tough Claws
romDesc: Contact moves are boosted by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of contact moves by 1.3x.

name: Pixilate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Fairy-type. If the user is Fairy-type its Fairy-type moves have a 10% infatuate chance, otherwise it gains Fairy STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Fairy. Fairy moves are empowered.

name: Gooey
romDesc: When the user is hit by a contact move, the attacker reduces their Speed by one stage. Activates multiple times against multihit moves.
shortDesc: Lowers Speed of enemies that make contact with this Pokémon.

name: Aerilate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Flying-type. If the user is Flying-type its Flying-type moves are 10% faster, otherwise it gains Flying STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Flying. Flying moves are empowered.

name: Parental Bond
romDesc: Makes all attacks hit twice in succession. The first hit deals 100%, while the second hit deals 25%. Each hit rolls secondary effects independently (except flinch). Bypasses Fort Knox/Wonder Skin.
shortDesc: Moves hit twice. 1st hit at 100% power, 2nd hit at 25%.

name: Dark Aura
romDesc: All Dark-type moves for the user, their allies, and the opponent get a 1.33x boost. Boost is reversed by Aura Break.
shortDesc: Boosts Dark moves by 1.33x for all while this Pokémon is out.

name: Fairy Aura
romDesc: All Fairy-type moves for the user, their allies, and the opponent get a 1.33x boost. Boost is reversed by Aura Break.
shortDesc: Boosts Fairy moves by 1.33x for all while this Pokémon is out.

name: Aura Break
romDesc: Causes Dark Aura and Fairy Aura to reduce their respective type moves by 25% instead of boosting them by 33%.
shortDesc: Cancels aura abilities and makes them 25% weaker instead.

name: Primordial Sea
romDesc: Creates Heavy Rain that lasts until user switches. Completely nullifies all damaging Fire moves. Water moves gain 50% boost. Cannot be overridden except by other primal weather. Activates extra effects on rain related moves. Halves the effectiveness of sun related moves.
shortDesc: Heavy Rain until switched out. Fire-type moves are unusable.

name: Desolate Land
romDesc: Creates Extremely Harsh Sunlight lasting until user switches. Completely nullifies all damaging Water moves. Fire moves gain 50% boost. Cannot be overridden except by other primal weather. Activates extra effects on sun related moves.
shortDesc: Intense Sun until switched out. Water-type moves are unusable.

name: Delta Stream
romDesc: Creates Strong Winds lasting until user switches. Reduces super-effective damage to all active Flying-types to neutral. Blocks all weather-based moves from hitting opponents. Cannot be overridden except by other primal weather.
shortDesc: Strong Winds until switched out. Weather-based moves not usable.

name: Stamina
romDesc: When hit, raises the user's Defense by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Getting hit raises Def by +1. Critical hits maximize Defense.

name: Wimp Out
romDesc: When the Pokemon receives damage and its HP drops to 50% or below for the first time in battle, it switches out to safety. Activates on the last hit of multihit moves.
shortDesc: At 1/2 of max HP or below, instantly switches out.

name: Emergency Exit
romDesc: When the Pokemon receives damage and its HP drops to 50% or below for the first time in battle, it switches out to safety. Activates on the last hit of multihit moves.
shortDesc: At 1/2 of max HP or below, instantly switches out.

name: Water Compaction
romDesc: Reduces damage from Water-type moves by 50% and raises Defense by 2 stages when hit by Water moves. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction. Defense boost applies after the hit lands. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Takes 1/2 dmg from Water-type moves. +2 Def when hit by those.

name: Merciless
romDesc: Guarantees critical hits against targets who are poisoned, paralyzed, bleeding, or have their speed lowered.
shortDesc: Always crits slowed, poisoned, paralyzed, or bleeding foes.

name: Shields Down
romDesc: Transforms Minior from Meteor Form to Core Form when HP drops to 50% or below. In Meteor Form, grants immunity to all status conditions. When using Shell Smash, immediately transforms to Core Form regardless of current HP. Cannot revert to Meteor Form once transformed during battle.
shortDesc: At 1/2 of max HP or below, transforms into Core form.

name: Stakeout
romDesc: Deals double damage to opponents that just switched in. Only works right after they switch in for 1 turn.
shortDesc: Deals double damage to opponents being switched in.

name: Water Bubble
romDesc: Doubles the power of Water-type moves and reduces Fire-type damage taken by 50%. Also provides complete immunity to burns, removing existing burns upon gaining the ability.
shortDesc: Halves Fire dmg taken. Doubles Water dmg dealt. No burns.

name: Steelworker
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Steel-type. If the user is Steel-type it resists Ghost and Dark, otherwise it gains Steel STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Steel. Steel resists Ghost and Dark.

name: Berserk
romDesc: Berserk activates when the Pokemon drops to half HP or below from an opposing attack, boosting its highest attacking stat by one stage. Includes stat stages to determine which gets boosted. Triggers only once per battle. Other damage sources that bring you to half HP or below will not activate it.
shortDesc: Boosts highest attack by +1 when at 1/2 of max HP or lower.

name: Slush Rush
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat by 50% during hail. Also grants immunity to hail damage.
shortDesc: This Pokémon's Speed gets a 1.5x boost in hail.

name: Long Reach
romDesc: Long Reach prevents the user from making contact with targets when using contact moves. Additionally, physical moves receive a 1.2x damage boost.
shortDesc: Physical moves get a 1.2x bonus and don't make contact.

name: Liquid Voice
romDesc: Liquid Voice converts Normal- type sound moves to Water-type and boosts them by 20%.
shortDesc: Sound moves get a 1.2x boost and become Water if Normal.

name: Triage
romDesc: Triage grants +3 priority to most healing moves. Includes draining moves like Giga Drain, and delayed healing moves like Wish. Does not work with  Aqua Ring, Grassy Terrain, Ingrain, Leech Seed, Pain Split, Present, or Pollen Puff.
shortDesc: Moves that have a healing effect gain +3 priority.

name: Galvanize
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Electric-type. If the user is Electric-type its Electric-type moves have a 10% chance to paralyze, otherwise it gains Electric STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Electric. Electric moves are empowered.

name: Surge Surfer
romDesc: Surge Surfer boosts the Pokemon's Speed by 50% when Electric Terrain is active. The boost applies immediately and disappears when it ends.
shortDesc: If Electric Terrain is active, gets a 1.5x Speed boost.

name: Schooling
romDesc: When at level 20 or above, transforms into School Form. Reverts to Solo Form when HP drops to 25% or less. This form change triggers automatically upon entry and at end of each turn. Cannot be overridden, suppressed, swapped, or copied in any way.
shortDesc: If Lv. 20 or more: changes into School form until 1/4 HP or less.

name: Disguise
romDesc: Disguise blocks the first damaging move that hits the Pokemon and changes its form after. Only non-status moves are blocked. In fog, the disguise is restored immediately once per switch in, or when fog is set again.
shortDesc: Protects once against an attack. Restores protection in fog.

name: Battle Bond
romDesc: Battle Bond immediately triggers a form change when this Pokemon deals the finishing blow to an opposing Pokemon. Cannot be copied.
shortDesc: Transforms into Battle Bond form after dealing a KO.

name: Power Construct
romDesc: Power Construct transforms Zygarde 50% or 10% forms into Complete form when HP drops to 50% or below at the end of any turn. Complete form has massive 216 HP (doubled from 108), making it an extremely bulky tank. The transformation is permanent for the battle and cannot be suppressed.
shortDesc: At 1/2 of max HP or below, transforms into Complete form.

name: Corrosion
romDesc: Poison-type moves become super effective against Steel-type Pokemon. Additionally, this Pokemon can inflict poison status on any type.
shortDesc: Poison is super effective vs Steel. Can poison any type.

name: Comatose
romDesc: Comatose considers the user as asleep for moves and statuses. The Pokemon can move normally and gains immunity to all status conditions. Cannot be copied or suppressed. Rest fails when used.
shortDesc: Can move, but is always asleep. Immune to status conditions.

name: Queenly Majesty
romDesc: Queenly Majesty prevents the user and its ally from being targeted by priority moves with priority higher than 0.
shortDesc: Protects itself and ally from priority moves.

name: Innards Out
romDesc: Innards Out activates when the Pokemon is knocked out by an opponent's attack. It inflicts the same amount of damage the fatal attack dealt back to the attacker. Cannot affect attackers protected by Magic Guard.
shortDesc: If KO'd, deals as much damage as what the fatal attack dealt.

name: Dancer
romDesc: When any Pokemon on the field uses a dance move, this Pokemon immediately uses the same move after. Triggers once per move.
shortDesc: Copies dance moves used by others.

name: Battery
romDesc: Battery provides a 30% boost to ally Pokemon's Special attacks in double battles. Does not affect the user's own moves.
shortDesc: Grants a 1.3x power boost to ally's Special attacks.

name: Fluffy
romDesc: Fluffy reduces damage from contact moves by 50%. Fire-type moves to deal double damage to the user. Multiplicative with other forms of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 1/2 dmg from contact moves but Fire moves hurt it 2x more.

name: Dazzling
romDesc: Dazzling blocks all priority moves from opponents targeting the user or allies.
shortDesc: Protects itself and ally from priority moves.

name: Soul-Heart
romDesc: Soul-Heart raises Special Attack by one stage when any Pokemon faints on the battlefield, including allies and enemies.
shortDesc: KOs dealt anywhere on the field raise Sp. Atk by one stage.

name: Tangling Hair
romDesc: When the user is hit by a contact move, the attacker reduces their Speed by one stage. Activates multiple times against multihit moves.
shortDesc: Lowers Speed of enemies that make contact with this Pokémon.

name: Receiver
romDesc: Receiver copies a fainted ally's ability, replacing Receiver. Persists until switched out.
shortDesc: In Double Battles, copies its fainting partner's ability.

name: Power of Alchemy
romDesc: Upon entry, transmutes all opposing Berries into Black Sludge. When any Pokemon loses an item during battle, it gets replaced by Black Sludge. If Black Sludge is removed, it gets replaced by Big Nugget.
shortDesc: Transmutes berries on entry. Transmutes items when lost.

name: Beast Boost
romDesc: Beast Boost raises the user's highest calculated stat by one stage each time it KOs an opponent. The stat raised is determined by comparing the raw stat without current modifiers such as stat raises.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO raises highest calculated stat by one stage.

name: RKS System
romDesc: RKS System changes the user's form based on its held Memory disc. Before each attack, the user overrides their type to match the move's type. Boosts STAB from 1.5x to 2.0x damage.
shortDesc: Held Memory determines its type. Also has Protean + Adaptability.

name: Electro Surge
romDesc: Creates Electric Terrain for 8 turns (12 with Terrain Extender) upon entry. Grounded Pokemon cannot fall asleep and Electric moves gain 30% power boost. Overrides other terrains when activated.
shortDesc: Casts Electric Terrain on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Psychic Surge
romDesc: Creates Psychic Terrain for 8 turns (12 with Terrain Extender) on entry. Grounded Pokemon are immune to priority moves from opponents. Psychic moves gain 30% power boost. Expanding Force hits all foes with increased power. Nature Power becomes Psychic. Overrides other existing terrains.
shortDesc: Casts Psychic Terrain on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Misty Surge
romDesc: Creates Misty Terrain on entry, lasting 8 turns (12 with Terrain Extender). Misty Terrain prevents all status conditions for grounded Pokemon and boosts Fairy-type moves by 30%. Overrides existing terrain.
shortDesc: Casts Misty Terrain on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Grassy Surge
romDesc: Creates Grassy Terrain for 8 turns (12 with Terrain Extender) on entry. Grounded Pokemon heal 1/16 HP per turn and Grass moves gain 30% power. Overrides other terrains.
shortDesc: Casts Grassy Terrain on entry. Lasts 8 turns.

name: Full Metal Body
romDesc: Full Metal Body gives immunity to all stat reductions from moves and abilities. Includes self stat drops from moves like Overheat.
shortDesc: Immune to stat drops.

name: Shadow Shield
romDesc: Shadow Shield halves damage from all attacks when at full HP. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: At full HP, halves damage taken from attacks

name: Prism Armor
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 35% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Neuroforce
romDesc: Super effective attacks are boosted by 35%.
shortDesc: Grants an additional 1.35x boost to Super-effective moves.

name: Intrepid Sword
romDesc: Intrepid Sword raises the Pokemon's Attack stat by one stage when switching into battle.
shortDesc: On entry, raises Attack by one stage.

name: Dauntless Shield
romDesc: Dauntless Shield immediately raises Defense by one stage when entering battle.
shortDesc: On entry, raises Defense by one stage.

name: Libero
romDesc: Libero overrides the user's type to match the move being used before it attacks. Cannot activate on Struggle moves.
shortDesc: Before using a move, changes its type to the move's type.

name: Ball Fetch
romDesc: No effect in battle.
shortDesc: No effect in battle.

name: Cotton Down
romDesc: Cotton Down triggers when the Pokemon is hit by any attack, lowering the Speed of ALL Pokemon by one stage. Activates multiple times against multihit moves.
shortDesc: Lowers the Speed of all foes by one stage when hit.

name: Propeller Tail
romDesc: Propeller Tail boosts the user's Speed by 50% during rain and grants immunity to redirection effects. The speed boost works in all forms of rain.
shortDesc: Swift Swim + Redirection Immunity.

name: Mirror Armor
romDesc: Mirror Armor reflects all stat- lowering effects aimed at the user back to the attacker. The reflection bypasses immunities.
shortDesc: Bounces back any stat drops inflicted by an enemy.

name: Gulp Missile
romDesc: When Cramorant uses Surf, Triple Dive or Dive, it catches prey: Gulping form if HP >50% or Gorging form if HP <=50%. When hit in either form, spits prey dealing 25% max HP damage to attacker and returns to base. Gulping Form also lowers Defense by 1; Gorging Form paralyzes. Cannot be suppressed etc.
shortDesc: Gulps a prey after Dive/Surf. If hit, shoots prey at enemy.

name: Stalwart
romDesc: Can't have its moves redirected, can't be critically hit, and can't have its abilities suppressed. Ability suppression includes effects such as Mold Breaker, Gastro Acid, Neutralizing Gas, and Mycelium Might.
shortDesc: Isn't affected by redirection, crits, or ability suppression.

name: Steam Engine
romDesc: Steam Engine maximizes the Speed stat to +6 stages when hit by any Fire-type or Water-type move. The boost occurs immediately after taking damage.
shortDesc: Maximizes Speed if hit by a Fire-type or Water-type attack.

name: Punk Rock
romDesc: Punk Rock amplifies the user's sound moves by 30% and reduces incoming sound move damage by 50%. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Sound moves deal 1.3x more dmg. Takes -50% dmg from sound moves.

name: Sand Spit
romDesc: When damaged by an attack summons an 8-turn sandstorm if one isn't present. If a sandstorm is summoned the attacker is knocked to the ground. The user gains immunity to sandstorm damage. Does not activate if the user faints from the attack.
shortDesc: Summons a sandstorm when hit. Attacker is then grounded.

name: Ice Scales
romDesc: Halves all incoming Special Attack damage. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Halves damage taken by Special moves. Does NOT double SpDef.

name: Ripen
romDesc: Ripen doubles all beneficial berry effects. Healing berries restore twice as much HP, stat- boosting berries raise stats by 2 stages instead of 1, resist berries reduce super-effective damage by 75% instead of 50%, and PP-restoring berries restore twice as much PP.
shortDesc: Doubles resistance, healing and stat raises provided by Berries.

name: Ice Face
romDesc: Ice Face transforms Eiscue into its Noice Face form after taking a physical attack, negating damage once. While in Noice form, if hail is set or if the user is swapped in, revert to Ice Face form. Cannot be copied or suppressed.
shortDesc: Protects once against an attack. Restores protection under hail.

name: Power Spot
romDesc: Power Spot boosts allies' attack power by 30% in double battles. The user itself receives no boost.
shortDesc: Grants a 1.3x boost to ally's attacks.

name: Mimicry
romDesc: Mimicry changes the Pokemon's type to match active terrain: Electric on Electric Terrain, Fairy on Misty Terrain, Grass on Grassy Terrain, or Psychic on Psychic Terrain. The type change persists until terrain ends or the Pokemon switches out. Retains type changes from moves like Soak.
shortDesc: Changes type depending on active Terrain.

name: Screen Cleaner
romDesc: Screen Cleaner removes all protective screens from both sides of the battlefield - Reflect, Light Screen, Aurora Veil, and Smokescreen - when the Pokemon enters battle. It also allows the Pokemon to set screens while they are already active, refreshing their duration.
shortDesc: Clears screens from both sides on entry. Can reset screens.

name: Steely Spirit
romDesc: Steely Spirit increases the power of Steel-type moves by 30% for both the user and its allies in battle.
shortDesc: Boosts own & ally's Steel-type moves by 1.3x.

name: Perish Body
romDesc: When hit by a contact move, Perish Body activates Perish Song on both the user and the attacker. Both Pokemon will faint in 3 turns unless they switch out.
shortDesc: If hit, casts Perish Song.

name: WandrngSprit
romDesc: When hit by a contact move, Wandering Spirit swaps abilities with the attacker. Both Pokemon regain their original ability upon switching out. Cannot swap with abilities that are also unable to be copied or suppressed.
shortDesc: Trades ability with attacker on contact.

name: Gorilla Tactics
romDesc: Gorilla Tactics boosts physical move power by 50% but locks the user into using the first move selected until they switch out.
shortDesc: Raises own Atk by 1.5x, but can only use the first chosen move.

name: Neutralizing Gas
romDesc: Fills the area with gas that completely suppresses all abilities except unsuppressable ones. Effect lasts while user is on field. After the user attempts to switch, all suppressed abilities reactivate their entry effects. Cannot be copied or swapped.
shortDesc: All abilities are nullified.

name: Pastel Veil
romDesc: Pastel Veil automatically sets up Safeguard for the user's team when the Pokemon enters battle. Safeguard lasts for 5 turns and protects all team members from status conditions.
shortDesc: Casts Safeguard on entry.

name: Hunger Switch
romDesc: Automatically switches between Full and Hangry forms at the end of each turn. Cannot be overridden, suppressed, swapped, or copied in any way.
shortDesc: Changes between Full and Hangry forms after each turn.

name: Quick Draw
romDesc: Quick Draw gives a 30% chance for the user to act first in their priority bracket. Stacks multiplicatively with Quick Claw for a 44% chance to activate.
shortDesc: 30% chance to move first.

name: Unseen Fist
romDesc: Unseen Fist allows all contact moves to bypass protection moves and ignore any secondary effects associated with them.
shortDesc: Contact moves strike through protection.

name: CuriusMedicn
romDesc: Curious Medicine removes an ally's positive and negative stat changes on the user's entry.
shortDesc: Resets its ally's stat changes on entry.

name: Transistor
romDesc: Transistor increases the power of all Electric-type moves by 50%. Stacks additively with other damage modifiers.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of Electric-type moves by 1.5x.

name: Dragon’s Maw
romDesc: Dragon's Maw boosts the power of Dragon-type moves by 50%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of Dragon-type moves by 1.5x.

name: ChillngNeigh
romDesc: When this Pokemon knocks out an opponent with a direct attack, its Attack stat increases by one stage.
shortDesc: KOs raise Attack by one stage.

name: Grim Neigh
romDesc: Grim Neigh boosts the Pokemon's Special Attack by one stage when it causes an opponent to faint with a direct attack.
shortDesc: KOs raise Sp. Atk by one stage.

name: As One
romDesc: Prevents all opposing Pokemon from consuming held items. Raise Attack by one stage when the user knocks out an opponent with a direct attack.
shortDesc: Unnerve + Chilling Neigh.

name: As One
romDesc: Prevents all opposing Pokemon from consuming held items. Raise Attack by one stage when the user knocks out an opponent with a direct attack.
shortDesc: Unnerve + Grim Neigh.

name: Chloroplast
romDesc: Weather Ball doubles power and becomes Fire-type. Solar moves charge instantly. Growth boosts Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. Moonlight, Morning Sun, and Synthesis recover 2/3 of your max HP. Grass and Water Pledge creates a sea of fire or rainbow respectively.
shortDesc: Weather Ball, Solar Beam/Blade, Growth act as if used in sun.

name: Whiteout
romDesc: Whiteout boosts the Pokemon's highest attacking stat by 50% during hail. Also grants immunity to hail damage.
shortDesc: Ups highest attacking stat by 1.5x in hail.

name: Pyromancy
romDesc: Pyromancy multiplies the burn chance of all moves by 5x. Does not interact with Flame Body.
shortDesc: Moves inflict burn 5x as often.

name: Keen Edge
romDesc: Keen Edge boosts all slashing attacks by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of slashing moves by 1.3x.

name: Prism Scales
romDesc: Prism Scales reduces damage from all Special attacks by 30%. Stacks multiplicatively with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: Takes 30% less damage from Special attacks.

name: Power Fists
romDesc: Punching moves gain a 30% damage boost and target Special Defense instead of Defense.
shortDesc: Iron Fist moves target Special Defense and get a 1.3x boost.

name: Sand Song
romDesc: Sand Song boosts the power of all sound-based moves by 20% and converts Normal-type sound moves to Ground-type.
shortDesc: Sound moves get a 1.2x boost and become Ground if Normal.

name: Rampage
romDesc: Rampage eliminates recharge turns when the user successfully KOs an opponent with a direct attack.
shortDesc: No recharge after a KO, if it usually would need to recharge.

name: Vengeance
romDesc: Boosts the power of Ghost-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Ghost-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Blitz Boxer
romDesc: Blitz Boxer grants +1 priority to all punching moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: At full HP, gives +1 priority to this Pokémon's punching moves.

name: Antarctic Bird
romDesc: Antarctic Bird grants a 1.3x power boost to both Ice-type and Flying-type moves. Additive with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: Ice-type and Flying-type moves get a 1.3x power boost.

name: Immolate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Fire-type. If the user is Fire-type its Fire-type moves have a 10% chance to burn, otherwise it gains Fire STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Fire. Fire moves are empowered.

name: Crystallize
romDesc: Crystallize converts all Rock- type moves to Ice-type and boosts their power by 10%.
shortDesc: Rock-type moves become Ice and get a 1.1x boost.

name: Electrocytes
romDesc: Electrocytes boosts Electric- type moves by 25%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of Electric-type moves by 1.25x.

name: Aerodynamics
romDesc: When targeted by Flying-type moves, Aerodynamics absorbs the attack and raises the user's Speed stat by one stage.
shortDesc: Boosts Speed instead of being hit by Flying-type moves.

name: Christmas Spirit
romDesc: Christmas Spirit reduces all incoming damage by 50% during hail weather. Grants immunity to hail damage. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: Takes 50% less damage if hail is active.

name: Exploit Weakness
romDesc: When attacking a statused opponent, targets their lower defensive stat.
shortDesc: Targets lowest defense vs statused foes.

name: Ground Shock
romDesc: Ground Shock allows Electric moves to hit Ground-type Pokemon for 0.5x damage.
shortDesc: Target Grounds aren't immune to Electric but resist it instead.

name: Ancient Idol
romDesc: Physical moves use the Defense stat of the user instead of Attack for damage, while special moves use the Special Defense stat of the user instead of Special Attack.
shortDesc: Uses Def and Sp. Def instead of Atk and Sp. Atk when attacking.

name: Mystic Power
romDesc: Mystic Power grants the 1.5x STAB damage bonus to all moves regardless of type matching. Does not boost moves that already receive a STAB bonus.
shortDesc: All moves gain the 1.5x power boost from STAB.

name: Perfectionist
romDesc: Attacks with 50 BP or less raise their critical hit ratio by one stage, and attacks with 25 BP or lower also gain +1 priority.
shortDesc: Move BP < 51 BP: +1 to crit rate. Move BP < 26 BP: +1 priority too.

name: Growing Tooth
romDesc: Growing Tooth boosts the user's Attack by one stage whenever they successfully hit with a biting move.
shortDesc: Raises Attack by one stage after using a biting move.

name: Inflatable
romDesc: When hit by any Fire or Flying moves, boost Defense and Special Defense by one stage each. Activates on each hit of a multihit move. The boost applies after the hit lands.
shortDesc: Ups Def and Sp. Def by one stage if hit by Flying or Fire moves.

name: Aurora Borealis
romDesc: Aurora Borealis grants STAB to all Ice-type moves regardless of the Pokemon's typing. Weather Ball becomes Ice-type with doubled power, Aurora Veil works without hail, and weather-based Ice moves like Blizzard to never miss.
shortDesc: Ice-type moves gain STAB. Moves always benefit from hail.

name: Avenger
romDesc: Avenger boosts the power of all moves by 50% for one turn after any party Pokemon faints.
shortDesc: If a party Pokémon fainted last turn, next move gets 1.5x boost.

name: Let's Roll
romDesc: Let's Roll automatically raises Defense by one stage and applies the Defense Curl status upon entering battle, doubling the power of Rollout and other rolling moves.
shortDesc: Casts Defense Curl on entry.

name: Aquatic
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Water to the user's current typing. Retains Water typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Water type on entry.

name: Loud Bang
romDesc: Sound-based attacks have a 50% chance to confuse the target upon a successful hit.
shortDesc: Sound-based moves have 50% chance to confuse the foe.

name: Lead Coat
romDesc: Lead Coat reduces physical damage by 40% but decreases Speed by 10%. Also triples the user's weight. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Takes 40% less from Phys. moves. This Pokémon's Speed is 0.9x.

name: Amphibious
romDesc: Grants STAB to Water-type moves regardless of the user's typing. Also provides immunity to being drenched.
shortDesc: Water moves gain STAB. Can't become drenched.

name: Grounded
romDesc: Grounded adds Ground type to the Pokemon upon entry. Retains Ground typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Ground type on entry.

name: Earthbound
romDesc: Boosts the power of Ground-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Ground-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Fighting Spirit
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Fighting-type. If the user is Fighting-type its Fighting-type moves break screens, otherwise it gains Fighting STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Fighting. Fighting moves are empowered.

name: Cryptic Power
romDesc: Feline Prowess increases the user's Special Attack stat by 2x. Multiplicative with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: Doubles own Sp. Atk stat. Boosts raw stat, not base stat.

name: Coil Up
romDesc: On entry, gives +1 priority to the first biting move used. Priority boost is consumed after landing any biting move.
shortDesc: On entry, gives +1 priority once to the first biting move used.

name: Fossilized
romDesc: Fossilized reduces Rock-type damage by 50% and boosts the user's Rock moves by 20%. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources, while the damage boost is additive with other sources.
shortDesc: Halves dmg taken by Rock moves. Boosts own Rock moves by 1.2x.

name: Magical Dust
romDesc: If the user makes contact with another Pokemon, offensively or defensively, the other Pokemon's type is changed to pure Psychic. This happens immediately for multihit or priority moves and can remove STAB in the middle of an enemy's multihit move.
shortDesc: Makes foe Psychic-type on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Dreamcatcher
romDesc: Dreamcatcher doubles the power of the user's moves when any opponent on the field is asleep. This includes the user, allies, or opponents. Attacks hit sleeping foes who are switching out for 1x power instead, damaging them before leaving. Does not activate against Comatose.
shortDesc: Doubles damage if an opponent is sleeping. Pursues sleeping foes.

name: Nocturnal
romDesc: Dark-type moves receive a 25% boost, and the user takes 25% less damage from Dark and Fairy moves. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Boosts own Dark moves by 1.25x. Takes -25% dmg from Dark/Fairy.

name: Self Sufficient
romDesc: Recovers 1/16 of max HP at the end of each turn.
shortDesc: Recovers 1/16 of max HP at the end of each turn.

name: Tectonize
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Ground-type. If the user is Ground-type it is immune to Stealth Rocks and Spikes, otherwise it gains Ground STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves becomes Ground. Might ignore hazards.

name: Ice Age
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Ice to the user's current typing. Retains Ice typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Ice type on entry.

name: Half Drake
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Dragon to the user's current typing. Retains Dragon typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Dragon type on entry.

name: Liquified
romDesc: Liquified reduces contact move damage by 50% but doubles Water- type move damage taken. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: Takes 1/2 dmg from contact moves but Water moves hurt it 2x more.

name: Dragonfly
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Dragon to the user's current typing. Retains Dragon typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out. Also gives the user immunity to Ground-type attacks and field effects that require you to be grounded.
shortDesc: Adds Dragon type on entry. Avoids Ground attacks.

name: Dragonslayer
romDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Dragon-type Pokemon and takes 0.5x damage when attacked by Dragon-type Pokemon. Based on attacker/defender Pokemon types, not move types. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Dragons. Takes 0.5x damage from Dragons.

name: Mountaineer
romDesc: Mountaineer grants immunity to all Rock-type moves and Stealth Rock entry hazard damage.
shortDesc: Immune to Rock-type attacks and Stealth Rock damage.

name: Hydrate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Water-type. If the user is Water-type its Water-type moves have a 10% chance to drench, otherwise it gains Water STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Water. Water moves are empowered.

name: Metallic
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Steel to the user's current typing. Retains Steel typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Steel type on entry.

name: Permafrost
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 35% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Primal Armor
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 50%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 50% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Raging Boxer
romDesc: Raging Boxer causes punching moves to hit twice, with the first hit at 100% power and second hit at 40% power. Both attacks independently roll secondary effect chances (except flinch).
shortDesc: Punching moves hit twice. 1st hit at 100% power, 2nd hit at 40%.

name: Air Blower
romDesc: Air Blower automatically sets up a 3-turn Tailwind upon entering battle, doubling the Speed of all Pokemon on the user's side. Also activates Wind Rider.
shortDesc: Casts a 3-turn Tailwind on entry.

name: Juggernaut
romDesc: Juggernaut boosts contact moves by adding 20% of the user's Defense stat to attack calculations. Prevents paralysis and immediately cures the status if inflicted on the user.
shortDesc: Contact moves add 20% Def to attack. Paralysis-immune.

name: Short Circuit
romDesc: Boosts the power of Electric- type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Elec.-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Majestic Bird
romDesc: Majestic Bird boosts the user's Special Attack stat by 50%. Multiplicative with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: Boosts own Sp. Atk by 1.5x. Boosts raw stat, not base stat.

name: Phantom
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Ghost to user's current typing. Retains Ghost typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Ghost type on entry.

name: Intoxicate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Poison-type. If the user is Poison-type its Poison- type moves have a 10% chance to badly poison, otherwise it gains Poison STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Poison. Poison moves are empowered.

name: Impenetrable
romDesc: Impenetrable grants immunity to all non-attack damage sources including entry hazards, weather damage, status conditions, and recoil.
shortDesc: Only damaged by attacks.

name: Hypnotist
romDesc: Boosts Hypnosis' accuracy to 90%. Does not lock to accuracy to 90%, the move still gets affected by accuracy/evasiveness changes.
shortDesc: Hypnosis accuracy is 90% when used by this Pokémon.

name: Overwhelm
romDesc: Allows Dragon-type moves to hit Fairy-type Pokemon for normal damage instead of having no effect. Additionally, the user is immune to Intimidate and Scare.
shortDesc: Hits Fairies with Dragon moves. Immune to Intimidate and Scare.

name: Scare
romDesc: Upon entering battle, the user drops the Special Attack stat of all opposing Pokemon by one stage.
shortDesc: Lowers foes' Sp. Atk by one stage on entry.

name: Majestic Moth
romDesc: Majestic Moth raises the user's highest calculated base stat by 1 stage when it enters battle.
shortDesc: On entry, raises highest calculated stat by one stage.

name: Soul Eater
romDesc: When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO heals 1/4 of this Pokémon's max HP.

name: Soul Linker
romDesc: When the user takes a direct hit, the opponent takes identical damage. When landing a direct hit, the user also takes the same damage it inflicts. Does not activate when either Pokemon is knocked out, taking damage from Pain Split, or against another Soul Linker.
shortDesc: Enemies take all the damage they deal, same for this Pokémon.

name: Sweet Dreams
romDesc: Sweet Dreams restores 1/8 of maximum HP at the end of each turn when the user is asleep or has the Comatose ability. Additionally, it grants immunity to Bad Dreams damage.
shortDesc: Heals 1/8 of max HP every turn if asleep. Immune to Bad Dreams.

name: Bad Luck
romDesc: Foes can not land critical hits, always roll minimum damage (85% instead of 85-100%), fail to inflict secondary effects that are not guaranteed, and have a 5% chance to miss a move.
shortDesc: Foes can't crit, deal min damage, 5% less acc, & no effect chance.

name: Haunted Spirit
romDesc: Curses the attacker when knocked out by a direct hit. The curse inflicts 25% max HP damage per turn until the cursed Pokemon switches out or faints. Ghost-type attackers are immune to the curse.
shortDesc: When this Pokémon is KO'd, casts a Curse on the attacker.

name: Electric Burst
romDesc: Electric Burst boosts Electric- type moves by 35% but causes 10% recoil damage based on damage dealt (minimum 1 HP). The recoil damage will not knock out the user.
shortDesc: Electric-type moves deal 1.35x damage but have 10% recoil.

name: Raw Wood
romDesc: Reduces damage from Grass-type attacks by 50% while boosting the power of the user's own Grass-type moves by 20%. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Halves dmg taken by Grass moves. Boosts own Grass moves by 1.2x.

name: Solenoglyphs
romDesc: Solenoglyphs gives all biting moves a 50% chance to badly poison the target when landing.
shortDesc: Biting moves have a 50% chance to badly poison the target.

name: Spider Lair
romDesc: Sets Sticky Web on opponent's field when the user enters battle. Lasts 5 turns and lowers Speed by 1 stage for any grounded Pokemon switching in. Cannot activate if Sticky Web is already present on opponent's field.
shortDesc: Casts Sticky Web on entry. Lasts 5 turns.

name: Fatal Precision
romDesc: Super-effective damaging moves never miss and always land critical hits.
shortDesc: Super-effective moves never miss and always crit.

name: Fort Knox
romDesc: Immune to all damage boosting ability effects from opponents, other than Parental Bond and Multi-Headed.
shortDesc: Blocks most damage boosting and multihit abilities.

name: Seaweed
romDesc: If user is Grass-type, they take half damage from Fire-type attacks and deals 2x damage to Fire-type Pokemon with Grass- type moves. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 1/2 dmg from Fire if Grass. Grass deals x2 dmg to Fire.

name: Psychic Mind
romDesc: Boosts the power of Psychic- type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Psychic-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Poison Absorb
romDesc: The user draws in Poison-type moves and gains immunity to them, healing for 1/4th of max HP instead. Additionally, heals 1/8th of max HP per turn on Toxic Terrain.
shortDesc: Redirects Poison moves. Absorbs them, healing 25% HP.

name: Scavenger
romDesc: When this Pokemon defeats an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately regains 25% of its maximum HP.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO heals 1/4 of this Pokémon's max HP.

name: Twist. Dimension
romDesc: Sets up Trick Room on entry, lasts 3 turns.
shortDesc: Sets up Trick Room on entry, lasts 3 turns.

name: Multi-Headed
