romDesc: Attack 2-3 times per move based on number of heads. Two-headed Pokemon strike twice (1st hit does 100%, 2nd does 25%), three- headed hit thrice (1st hit does 100%, 2nd does 20%, 3rd does 15%). Each hit rolls secondary effects independently (except flinch). Bypasses Fort Knox/Wonder Skin.
shortDesc: Hits as many times, as it has heads.

name: North Wind
romDesc: Sets up Aurora Veil upon entering battle, cutting physical and special damage recieved by half for your entire team. Aurora Veil lasts 3 turns, or 5 turns with Light Clay. The user is also immune to Hail damage. Cannot trigger again if Aurora Veil is already active.
shortDesc: 3 turns Aurora Veil on entry. Immune to Hail damage.

name: Overcharge
romDesc: The user's Electric-type moves become effective against Electric-type Pokemon, dealing 2x damage instead of 0.5x. Also allows the user to paralyze Electric-types.
shortDesc: Electric is super effective vs Electric. Can paralyze Electric.

name: Violent Rush
romDesc: The user gains a 50% Speed boost and 20% Attack boost on their first turn after switching in.
shortDesc: Boosts Speed by 50% + Attack by 20% on first turn.

name: Flaming Soul
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to Fire-type moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: Fire-type moves get +1 priority at max HP.

name: Sage Power
romDesc: Boosts Special Attack by 50% but locks the user into using the first move selected until they switch out.
shortDesc: Ups Special Attack by 50% and locks move.

name: Bone Zone
romDesc: Bone moves bypass immunities and hit for normal damage, while resisted moves do 2x damage. Neutral/super effective moves remain unchanged.
shortDesc: Bone moves ignore immunities and deal 2x on not very effective.

name: Weather Control
romDesc: Grants immunity to weather- based moves: Thunder, Solar Beam/Blade, Hurricane, Blizzard, Silver Wind, Weather Ball, all Storm moves (not including Magma, Leaf, or Diamond), Sheer Cold, and Pledge moves. Does not stop weather setup or damage.
shortDesc: Negates all weather based moves from enemies.

name: Speed Force
romDesc: Adds 20% of the user's Speed stat to damage when using contact moves. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Contact moves use 20% of its Speed stat additionally.

name: Sea Guardian
romDesc: When entering battle during rain, Sea Guardian boosts your highest stat by one stage. Works with any rain type. Triggers once per switch-in.
shortDesc: Ups highest stat by +1 on entry when it rains.

name: Molten Down
romDesc: Molten Down makes Fire-type moves super effective against Rock-types instead of resisted.
shortDesc: Fire-type is super effective against Rock-type.

name: Hyper Aggressive
romDesc: Makes all attacks hit twice in succession. The first hit deals 100%, while the second hit deals 25%. Each hit rolls secondary effects independently (except flinch).
shortDesc: Moves hit twice. Second hit does 25% damage.

name: Flock
romDesc: Boosts the power of Flying-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Flying-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Field Explorer
romDesc: Boosts the power of moves that can be used in the overworld by 50%. Includes all HM moves, (Zen) Headbutt, Ice Spinner, Hidden/Secret Power, and Dig.
shortDesc: Boosts field moves by 50%. Cut, Surf, Strength etc.

name: Striker
romDesc: Striker increases the power of all kicking moves by 30%. Includes Pyro Ball.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of kicking moves by 1.3x.

name: Frozen Soul
romDesc: Frozen Soul grants +1 priority to all Ice-type moves when the user is at maximum HP.
shortDesc: Ice-type moves get +1 priority at max HP.

name: Predator
romDesc: When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO heals 1/4 of this Pokémon's max HP.

name: Looter
romDesc: When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO heals 1/4 of this Pokémon's max HP.

name: Lunar Eclipse
romDesc: Lunar Eclipse grants STAB bonus to both Fairy and Dark-type moves regardless of the user's typing. Improves Hypnosis accuracy to 90%.
shortDesc: Fairy & Dark gains STAB. Hypnosis has 1.5x accuracy.

name: Solar Flare
romDesc: Converts Normal-type moves to Fire-type and grants Fire-type STAB. If the user is Fire-type their Fire-type moves get 10% burn chance. Additionally activates any Sun related effects for the user's moves.
shortDesc: Chloroplast + Immolate.

name: Power Core
romDesc: Adds 20% of Defense stat to physical attacks and 20% of Special Defense stat to special attacks when calculating damage.
shortDesc: The Pokémon uses +20% of its Defense or SpDef during moves.

name: Sighting System
romDesc: Sighting System guarantees all moves hit regardless of accuracy checks. Moves with less than 80% base accuracy receive -3 priority.
shortDesc: Moves always hit. Moves last for moves less than 80% accuracy.

name: Bad Company
romDesc: Not implemented.
shortDesc: Not implemented right now. Has no effect.

name: Opportunist
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to all moves when targeting opponents with 50% HP or less.
shortDesc: +1 priority vs foes below 1/2 max HP.

name: Giant Wings
romDesc: Giant Wings boosts the power of all wing, wind, and air-based moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of wing, wind or air-based moves by 1.3x.

name: Momentum
romDesc: Contact moves use Speed stat for damage instead of Attack/Special Attack. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Contact moves use the Speed stat for damage calculation.

name: Grip Pincer
romDesc: Contact moves have a 50% chance to trap the target (like Wrap), preventing escape or switching. Against trapped targets, the user's moves ignore defensive stats changes and always hit. Trapped targets take 1/8 max HP damage each turn. Trap lasts 4-5 turns (7 with Grip Claw).
shortDesc: 50% chance to trap. Then ignores Defense & accuracy checks.

name: Big Leaves
romDesc: Activates any sun related effects for the user's moves. Boosts Speed stat by 50% in sun. Cures status in sun. 50% chance to restore berry on turn end, 100% in sun. Raises highest attacking stat by 50% in sun.
shortDesc: Chloroplast + Chlorophyll + Leaf Guard + Harvest + Solar Power.

name: Precise Fist
romDesc: Punching moves gain +1 critical hit stage and 5x their normal secondary effect chance.
shortDesc: Punching moves get +1 crit and 5x effect chance.

name: Deadeye
romDesc: The user is unable to miss arrow- based attacks and cannon moves (different from Mega Launcher moves, includes moves blocked by Bulletproof). Additionally, when landing critical hits, the attack targets the opponent's weaker defensive stat.
shortDesc: Arrow & cannon moves never miss. Crits hit weakest defense.

name: Artillery
romDesc: Mega Launcher moves always hit and strike both opposing Pokemon simultaneously. Unable to miss with pulse, beam, ball, aura, and other blast related moves.
shortDesc: Mega Launcher moves always hit and hit both foes.

name: Amplifier
romDesc: Amplifier boosts sound-based moves by 30% damage. Single- target sound moves gain spread targeting to hit both opposing Pokemon. Does not spread with multihit moves.
shortDesc: Ups sound moves by 30% and makes them hit both foes.

name: Ice Dew
romDesc: Redirects all Ice-type moves to this Pokemon and absorbs them. Upon absorbing an Ice move, boosts either Attack or Special Attack (whichever is higher) by one stage.
shortDesc: Redirects Ice moves. Absorbs them, ups highest Atk.

name: Sun Worship
romDesc: When entering battle during Sun, boosts the user's highest stat by one stage.
shortDesc: Ups highest stat by +1 on entry when sunny.

name: Pollinate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Bug-type. If the user is Bug-type it is immune to powder moves, otherwise it gains Bug STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves becomes Bug. Immune to powder if Bug-type.

name: Volcano Rage
romDesc: After using any Fire-type move, Volcano Rage triggers a followup Eruption attack with 50 base power. Damage scales with the user's current HP percentage, having 50 BP at full health.
shortDesc: Triggers 50 BP Eruption after using a Fire-type move.

name: Cold Rebound
romDesc: When struck by any contact move, Cold Rebound retaliates with Icy Wind (60 BP), lowering the attacker's Speed by one stage.
shortDesc: Attacks with Icy Wind when hit by a contact move.

name: Low Blow
romDesc: Low Blow uses a 40 BP Feint Attack when switching in, targeting a random opponent. Feint Attack is a Dark-type physical attack that never misses.
shortDesc: Attacks with 40BP Feint Attack on switch-in.

name: Nosferatu
romDesc: Moves that make contact deal an additional 20% damage and heal the user to heal for 1/2 of the damage dealt. This healing applies after all hits of multi- hit moves and after recoil is applied.
shortDesc: Contact moves do +20% damage and heal 1/2 of damage dealt.

name: Spectralize
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Ghost-type. If the user is Ghost-type its Ghost-type moves have a 10% fear chance, otherwise it gains Ghost STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Ghost. Ghost moves are empowered.

name: Spectral Shroud
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Ghost-type. If the user is Ghost-type its Ghost-type moves have a 10% fear chance, otherwise it gains Ghost STAB. Its moves, including status moves, have a 30% chance to badly poison the target.
shortDesc: Spectralize + 30% chance to badly poison the foe.

name: Discipline
romDesc: After using any Electric-type move, Thundercall automatically triggers a follow-up Smite attack at 20% power (24 base power). This physical Electric attack has an 80% accuracy, can paralyze targets (20% chance), and applies the Smack Down effect - grounding Flying-types.
shortDesc: Can switch while rampaging. Can't be confused or intimidated.

name: Thundercall
romDesc: Deal 1.5x damage to Water-type Pokemon and bypass defensive screens (Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil)/Substitutes.
shortDesc: Triggers Smite at 20% power when using an Electric move.

name: Marine Apex
romDesc: Mighty Horn boosts the power of horn and drill-based attacks by 30%.
shortDesc: 50% more damage to Water-types + Infiltrator.

name: Mighty Horn
romDesc: Every successful horn-based attack raises Attack by one stage after it lands.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of horn and drill-based by 1.3x.

name: Hardened Sheath
romDesc: Reduces both physical and special damage by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Ups Attack by +1 when using horn moves.

name: Arctic Fur
romDesc: Converts all Normal-type moves to Ghost-type and grants STAB for Ghost moves, regardless of the user's typing.
shortDesc: Weakens incoming physical and special moves by 35%.

name: Lethargy
romDesc: Reduces the user's total damage by 20% at the start of each turn, capping at -80%. Resets after switching.
shortDesc: Damage drops 20% each turn to 20%. Resets on switch-in.

name: Iron Barrage
romDesc: Boosts pulse, beam, ball, and aura moves by 30%. Guarantees all moves hit regardless of accuracy checks. Moves with less than 80% base accuracy receive - 3 priority.
shortDesc: Mega Launcher + Sighting System.

name: Steel Barrel
romDesc: Prevents all recoil damage from the user's moves and abilities. Also grants immunity to enrage recoil damage. Does not prevent crash damage or Explosion/Self- Destruct damage.
shortDesc: Immune to recoil damage, but not immune to Explosion/crash dmg.

name: Pyro Shells
romDesc: Pyro Shells triggers a 50 BP Normal-type Outburst after any Mega Launcher-boosted move. Outburst has no secondary effects and hits all surrounding Pokemon on the field.
shortDesc: Triggers 50 BP Outburst after using a Mega Launcher move.

name: Fungal Infection
romDesc: Spreads Leech Seed when using a contact move, draining 1/8th of the target's max HP at the end of each turn.
shortDesc: Contact moves inflict Leech Seed on the target.

name: Parry
romDesc: Reduces all damage by 20%. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources. Counters contact moves with Mach Punch at 20 BP.
shortDesc: Counters contact with Mach Punch. Takes 20% less damage.

name: Scrapyard
romDesc: Sets a layer of Spikes on the opponent's side when the user is successfully hit by a contact move. Each layer damages switching grounded Pokemon by 12.5%, 16.7%, or 25% of max HP for 1-3 layers respectively. Each hit of a multihitting attack sets a layer.
shortDesc: Sets a layer of Spikes when hit (contact move).

name: Loose Quills
romDesc: Sets a layer of Spikes on the opponent's side when the user is successfully hit by a contact move. Each layer damages switching grounded Pokemon by 12.5%, 16.7%, or 25% of max HP for 1-3 layers respectively. Each hit of a multihitting attack sets a layer.
shortDesc: Sets a layer of Spikes when hit (contact move).

name: Toxic Debris
romDesc: Toxic Debris automatically sets a layer of Toxic Spikes on the opponent's side when hit by a contact move. Each layer poisons switching grounded Pokemon: one layer causes regular poison, two layers cause badly poisoned. Each hit of a multihitting attack sets a layer.
shortDesc: Sets a layer of Toxic Spikes when hit by contact moves.

name: Roundhouse
romDesc: Roundhouse makes all kicking moves never miss and target the opponent's weaker defense stat.
shortDesc: Kicks always hit. Damages foes' weaker defenses.

name: Mineralize
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Rock-type. If the user is Rock-type its Rock-type moves have a 10% bleed chance, otherwise it gains Rock STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Rock. Rock moves are empowered.

name: Loose Rocks
romDesc: Set Stealth Rock on the opponent's side when the user is hit by any contact move. Stealth Rock deals 1/8th of the opponent's max HP when switching. Considered Rock-type damage and is modified by type effectiveness.
shortDesc: Deploys Stealth Rocks when hit by contact.

name: Spinning Top
romDesc: Spinning Top grants +1 Speed and removes all entry hazards from the user's side when using Fighting-type moves.
shortDesc: Fighting moves up speed +1 and clear hazards.

name: Retribution Blow
romDesc: Automatically uses 150 BP Hyper Beam against opponents that boost stats. The triggered Hyper Beam has no recharge period, allowing normal actions next turn.
shortDesc: Uses Hyper Beam if any foe uses an stat boosting move.

name: Fearmonger
romDesc: Fearmonger lowers both Attack and Special Attack of opposing Pokemon upon entry by one stage. Additionally provides a 10% chance to inflict fear when landing contact moves.
shortDesc: Intimidate + Scare; 10% chance to fear with contact moves.

name: King's Wrath
romDesc: King's Wrath triggers when the user or their ally has their stats lowered, immediately boosting the user's Attack and Defense by one stage. Does not activate from self drops.
shortDesc: Lowering any stats on its side raises Atk and Def.

name: Queen's Mourning
romDesc: Queen's Mourning triggers when the user or their ally has their stats lowered, immediately boosting the user's Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage. Does not activate from self drops.
shortDesc: Lowering any stats on its side raises SpAtk and SpDef.

name: Toxic Spill
romDesc: Toxic Spill damages all non- Poison-type Pokemon by 1/8 HP each turn. Pokemon with Poison Heal recover instead. Disappears when the user leaves.
shortDesc: Non-Poison-types take 1/8 dmg every turn when on field.

name: Desert Cloak
romDesc: All allies become immune to status conditions and secondary effects from enemy moves while sand is active.
shortDesc: Protects its side from status and secondary effects in sand.

name: Draconize
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Dragon-type. If the user is Dragon-type its Dragon- type moves deal neutal damage vs Fairy, otherwise it gains Dragon STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Dragon. Dragon moves are empowered.

name: Pretty Princess
romDesc: Pretty Princess increases the user's damage by 50% against targets with any negative stat stage.
shortDesc: Does 50% more damage if the target has any lowered stat.

name: Self Repair
romDesc: Recovers 1/16th of max HP at the end of the turn and cures all status conditions when switching out of battle.
shortDesc: Self Sufficient + Natural Cure.

name: Atomic Burst
romDesc: When hit by any move, the user becomes charged up, doubling the power of the next Electric-type move used. Converts all Normal- type moves into Electric-type moves and grants STAB for Electric-type moves. If they are Electric-type their Electric moves have a 10% paralysis chance.
shortDesc: Electromorphosis + Galvanize.

name: Hellblaze
romDesc: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves by 30%, or by 80% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Fire-type moves by 1.3x, or 1.8x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Riptide
romDesc: Boosts the power of Water-type moves by 30%, or by 80% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Water-type moves by 1.3x, or 1.8x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Forest Rage
romDesc: Boosts the power of Grass-type moves by 30%, or by 80% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Grass-type moves by 1.3x, or 1.8x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Primal Maw
romDesc: Primal Maw causes all biting moves to hit twice. The first hit deals 100% damage while the second hit deals 40% damage. Independently rolls secondary effects of attacks on each hit (except flinch).
shortDesc: Biting moves hit twice. 2nd hit does 0.4x damage.

name: Sweeping Edge
romDesc: Sweeping Edge makes all Keen Edge moves never miss and hit both opposing Pokemon in double battles. Multihit moves will only hit each target one time.
shortDesc: Keen Edge moves always hit and hit both foes.

name: Gifted Mind
romDesc: Gifted Mind grants immunity to Dark, Ghost, and Bug-type moves while making all status moves used by this Pokemon never miss. This immunity ignores Inverse Room.
shortDesc: Nulls Psychic weakness; status moves always hit.

name: Hydro Circuit
romDesc: Hydro Circuit boosts Electric- type moves by 50% and heals the user for 25% of damage dealt when using Water-type moves.
shortDesc: Electric moves +50%; Water moves siphon 25% damage.

name: Equinox
romDesc: Equinox chooses the higher offensive stat for each attack. If Attack is higher, physical and special moves use your Attack stat. If Special Attack is higher, physical and special moves use your Special Attack stat.
shortDesc: Boosts Atk or SpAtk to match the higher value.

name: Absorbant
romDesc: Absorbant boosts HP recovery from drain moves by 50% and applies Leech Seed to the target on hit, draining the target for 1/8th of their max HP at the end of each turn.
shortDesc: Drain moves recover +50% HP & apply Leech Seed.

name: Clueless
romDesc: Clueless negates all weather, terrain, and room effects while active on the field.
shortDesc: Negates Weather, Rooms and Terrains.

name: Cheating Death
romDesc: Negates the first two instances of damage received. Moves still connect and secondary effects apply, but damage becomes 0.
shortDesc: Gets no damage for the first two hits.

name: Cheap Tactics
romDesc: Cheap Tactics uses Scratch (40 BP Normal physical move) targeting a random opponent when switching into battle.
shortDesc: Attacks with Scratch on switch-in.

name: Coward
romDesc: Coward automatically activates Protect on entry. Works once per battle.
shortDesc: Sets up Protect on switch-in. Only works once.

name: Volt Rush
romDesc: Volt Rush grants +1 priority to all Electric-type moves when the Pokemon is at full HP.
shortDesc: At full HP, gives +1 priority to its Electric-type moves.

name: Dune Terror
romDesc: Dune Terror reduces damage taken by 35% during a sandstorm and boosts Ground-type moves by 20%. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Sand reduces damage by 35%. Boosts Ground moves by 20%.

name: Infernal Rage
romDesc: Infernal Rage boosts Fire-type moves by 35% but inflicts 5% recoil damage after using them. Recoil is calculated from damage dealt with minimum of 1 HP lost. This recoil cannot knock the user out.
shortDesc: Fire-type moves are boosted by 35% with 5% recoil.

name: Dual Wield
romDesc: Mega Launcher and Keen Edge moves that hit one time normally now hit twice, with each hit dealing 70% of the move's normal damage. Secondary effects roll independently for each hit (except flinch).
shortDesc: Mega Launcher and Keen Edge moves hit twice for 70% damage.

name: Elemental Charge
romDesc: Elemental Charge gives attacking moves a 20% chance to inflict status conditions based on move type: Electric moves cause paralysis, Fire moves cause burn, and Ice moves cause frostbite.
shortDesc: 20% chance to BRN/FRZ/PARA with respective types.

name: Ambush
romDesc: Ambush guarantees a critical hit on the user's first turn after switching in or at the start of battle.
shortDesc: Guaranteed critical hit on first turn.

name: Atlas
romDesc: Atlas sets Gravity upon entering battle for 8 turns. Gravity prevents levitating moves like Fly; grounds all Pokemon making them vulnerable to Ground moves, Arena Trap, and hazards; boosts Grav Apple's damage by 50%; and boosts move accuracy by 66%.
shortDesc: Sets Gravity on entry for 8 turns.

name: Radiance
romDesc: Radiance increases the user's accuracy by 20% for all moves and causes Dark moves to fail.
shortDesc: +20% accuracy; Dark moves fail when user is present.

name: Jaws of Carnage
romDesc: Restores 50% max HP when defeating foes with biting moves or 25% with other moves. Only activates when knocking out a target with a direct hit.
shortDesc: Devours 1/2 of the foe when defeating it.

name: Angel's Wrath
romDesc: Tackle Encores+Disables, String Shot sets all hazards, Harden omniboosts by one stage, Iron Defense becomes a King's Shield that drops all stats, Electroweb traps, Bug Bite heals damage dealt, Poison Sting badly poisons+is super-effective on Steel. All enhanced attacks get a large damage boost.
shortDesc: Drastically alters all of the users moves.

name: Prismatic Fur
romDesc: Changes type to resist attacks before getting hit, changes type to match moves before landing a hit, halves physical damage, and halves special damage. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Color Change + Protean + Fur Coat + Ice Scales.

name: Shocking Jaws
romDesc: Shocking Jaws gives all biting moves a 50% chance to paralyze the target on hit. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Biting moves have 50% chance to paralyze the target.

name: Fae Hunter
romDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Fairy-type Pokemon and takes 0.5x damage when attacked by Fairy-type Pokemon. Based on attacker/defender Pokemon types, not move types. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Fairy. Takes 0.5x damage from Fairy.

name: Gravity Well
romDesc: Sets Gravity upon entering battle for 5 turns. Gravity prevents levitating moves like Fly; grounds all Pokemon making them vulnerable to Ground moves, Arena Trap, and hazards; boosts Grav Apple's damage by 50%; and boosts move accuracy by 66%.
shortDesc: Sets Gravity on entry for 5 turns.

name: Evaporate
romDesc: Evaporate negates all damage from Water-type moves and sets Mist for 5 turns on the user's side when hit by Water moves. Mist protects the entire team from stat reductions, including self drops.
shortDesc: Takes no damage and sets Mist if hit by water.

name: Lumberjack
romDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Grass-type Pokemon and takes 0.5x damage when attacked by Grass-type Pokemon. Based on attacker/defender Pokemon types, not move types. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Grass. Takes 0.5x damage from Grass.

name: Well-Baked Body
romDesc: Well Baked Body grants immunity to Fire-type moves and boosts Defense by 2 stages when hit by Fire attacks.
shortDesc: Boosts Defense sharply instead of being hit by Fire-type moves.

name: Furnace
romDesc: Furnace boosts Speed by +2 stages when hit by Rock-type moves or when switching in with Stealth Rock present.
shortDesc: User gains +2 Speed when when hit by rocks.

name: Electromorphosis
romDesc: When hit by any move, the user becomes charged up, doubling the power of the next Electric-type move used. Charged status is consumed after one Electric move use.
shortDesc: Charges up when getting hit.

name: Rocky Payload
romDesc: Rocky Payload boosts Rock-type and throwing-based moves by 50%. Throwing moves include Rock Throw, Egg Bomb, Rock Slide, Rock Tomb, Fling, Rock Wrecker, Grav Apple, and Astral Barrage.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of Rock-type and throwing moves by 1.5x.

name: Earth Eater
romDesc: Earth Eater heals the Pokemon for 25% of its maximum HP when hit by Ground-type moves.
shortDesc: Heals 25% of max HP when hit by a Ground move.

name: Lingering Aroma
romDesc: Lingering Aroma changes the attacker's ability (not innates) to Lingering Aroma when the user is hit by a contact move.
shortDesc: If hit, makes the attacker's ability Lingering Aroma.

name: Fairy Tale
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Fairy to the user's current typing. Retains Fairy typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out.
shortDesc: Adds Fairy type on entry.

name: Raging Moth
romDesc: Fire moves to hit twice, with each hit dealing 70% of the move's normal damage. Secondary effects roll independently for each hit (except flinch).
shortDesc: Fire moves hits twice, both hits at 70% power.

name: Adrenaline Rush
romDesc: Boosts the user's Speed by one stage whenever it knocks out an opponent with a direct hit.
shortDesc: KOs raise Speed by one stage.

name: Archmage
romDesc: 30% chance to add type-based effects: Poison=Toxic, Ice=Frostbite, Water=Confusion, Fire=Burn, Electric/Psychic/Fairy/Grass set terrain, Normal=Encore, Rock=Stealth Rock, Ghost=Disable, Dark=Bleed, Fighting=+SpAtk, Flying=+Speed, Dragon=-Atk, Ground=Trap, Steel=+Def.
shortDesc: 30% chance of adding a type related effect to each move.

name: Cryomancy
romDesc: Cryomancy multiplies the chance of inflicting frostbite by 5x on all moves.  Does not interact with Freezing Point.
shortDesc: Moves inflict frostbite 5x as often.

name: Phantom Pain
romDesc: Phantom Pain removes Normal- type immunity to Ghost-type moves, allowing Ghost attacks to hit Normal-type Pokemon for 1x effectiveness.
shortDesc: Ghost-type moves deal normal damage to Normal.

name: Purgatory
romDesc: Boosts the power of Ghost-type moves by 30%, or by 80% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Ghost-type moves by 1.3x, or 1.8x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Emanate
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Psychic-type. If the user is Psychic-type its Psychic-type moves have a 10% confusion chance, otherwise it gains Psychic STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Psychic. Psychic moves are empowered.

name: Kunoichi's Blade
romDesc: Boosts moves with 60 BP or less by 1.5x. Does not boost moves with 60 BP or less if they potentially can have more than 60 BP, such as Revenge or Venoshock. Multihit moves to always hit 5 times. For moves that only hit 3 times or Population Bomb, there will be one accuracy check for all hits.
shortDesc: Technician + Skill Link.

name: Monkey Business
romDesc: Monkey Business automatically uses Tickle upon switching into battle, lowering the opposing Pokemon's Attack and Defense stats by one stage each.
shortDesc: Uses Tickle on entry.

name: Combat Specialist
romDesc: Combat Specialist boosts the power of punching and kicking moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of punching and kicking moves by 1.3x.

name: Jungle's Guard
romDesc: Jungle's Guard shields the user+Grass-type allies from status conditions and stat drops while healing the user's status at the end of each turn during sun.
shortDesc: Protects Grass-type allies from status and stat drops.

name: Hunter's Horn
romDesc: Boosts the power of horn and drill-based attacks by 30%. When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP.
shortDesc: Boost horn moves and heals 1/4 HP when defeating an enemy.

name: Pixie Power
romDesc: All Fairy-type moves for the user, their allies, and the opponent get a 1.33x boost. Boost is reversed by Aura Break. 1.2x accuracy on all moves.
shortDesc: 1.2x accuracy. Boosts Fairy moves by 1.33x for all.

name: Plasma Lamp
romDesc: Plasma Lamp boosts both power and accuracy of Fire and Electric-type moves by 20% each.
shortDesc: Boost accuracy & power of Fire & Electric type moves by 1.2x.

name: Magma Eater
romDesc: When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP. Fire-type are moves super effective against Rock- types instead of resisted.
shortDesc: Predator + Molten Down.

name: Super Hot Goo
romDesc: Contact moves have a 30% chance to inflict burn and the user lowers the attacker's Speed by one stage when receiving a contact move.
shortDesc: Inflicts burn and lowers Speed on contact.

name: Nika
romDesc: Punching moves are boosted by 30%. Water moves receive no penalty when sun is on the field.
shortDesc: Iron fist + Water moves function normally under sun.

name: Archer
romDesc: Archer boosts the power of arrow-based moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of arrow moves by 1.3x.

name: Cold Plasma
romDesc: Causes Electric-type moves to inflict burn instead of paralysis.
shortDesc: Electric type moves now inflict burn instead of paralysis.

name: Super Slammer
romDesc: Super Slammer boosts the power of hammer-based moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of hammer and slamming moves by 1.3x.

name: Inversion
romDesc: Sets up Inverse Room on entry, lasts 3 turns.
shortDesc: Sets up Inverse Room on entry, lasts 3 turns.

name: Accelerate
romDesc: Accelerate eliminates the charging turn requirement for two-turn moves, allowing them to be used instantly.
shortDesc: Moves that need a charge turn are now used instantly.

name: Frost Burn
romDesc: Triggers a 40 BP Ice Beam immediately after using any Fire-type move.
shortDesc: Triggers 40BP Ice Beam after using a Fire-type move.

name: Itchy Defense
romDesc: Itchy Defense traps attackers with Infestation when the user is successfully hit by a contact move. The trapped opponent loses 1/8th of their maximum HP damage each turn for 4-5 turns and cannot switch out.
shortDesc: Causes infestation when hit by a contact move.

name: Generator
romDesc: Generator charges up the user once upon switching in, doubling Electric-type move power for the next Electric attack. Recharge when Electric Terrain becomes active during battle. The charged state is lost upon switching out or after using an Electric move.
shortDesc: Charges up once on entry or when electric terrain is active.

name: Moon Spirit
romDesc: Moon Spirit grants STAB to all Fairy and Dark-type moves regardless of the user's typing. When using Moonlight, recovery increases to 75% max HP instead of normal 50% or weather- modified amounts.
shortDesc: Fairy & Dark gains STAB. Moonlight recovers 75% HP.

name: Dust Cloud
romDesc: Uses Sand Attack on the opponent upon switching into battle, reducing the target's accuracy by one stage.
shortDesc: Attacks with Sand Attack on switch-in.

name: Berserker Rage
romDesc: When hit, raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. When the user knocks out an opponent, it instantly recovers from recharge status, allowing immediate use of moves like Hyper Beam without waiting.
shortDesc: Tipping Point + Rampage.

name: Trickster
romDesc: Uses Disable on switch-in. Disable prevents the target from using their last-used move for 4 turns. Fails if the target has not moved yet.
shortDesc: Uses Disable on switch-in.

name: Sand Guard
romDesc: Sand Guard blocks priority moves and reduces Special Attack damage by 50% during a sandstorm. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Blocks priority and reduces special damage by 1/2 in sand.

name: Natural Recovery
romDesc: Cures all status conditions when switching out. Also restores 33% of maximum HP when switching out.
shortDesc: Natural Cure + Regenerator.

name: Wind Rider
romDesc: Boosts the user's highest attacking stat when entering battle under Tailwind. When hit by wind-based moves, absorbs the attack and raises the highest attacking stat by one stage.
shortDesc: Increases attack in tailwind or when hit by wind move.

name: Soothing Aroma
romDesc: On entry, heals all status conditions from every Pokemon in the user's party, including both active and benched Pokemon.
shortDesc: Cures party status on entry.

name: Prim and Proper
romDesc: When hit by making contact (offensively or defensively), has a 50% chance to infatuate the attacker (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half). Only works on Pokemon of the opposite gender. Immune to all damage boosting ability effects from opponents, other than Parental Bond and Multi-Headed.
shortDesc: Wonder Skin + Cute Charm.

name: Super Strain
romDesc: The user's moves deal 25% of the damage done to the user as recoil. When the user knocks out the opponent with a direct attack, user's Attack stat drops by 1 stage.
shortDesc: KOs lower Attack by +1. Take 25% recoil damage.

name: Tipping Point
romDesc: When hit, raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Getting hit raises SpAtk. Critical hits maximize SpAtk.

name: Enlightened
romDesc: Converts all Normal-type moves to Psychic-type and grants STAB for Psychic moves, regardless of the user's type. Focus Blast never misses. Unaffected by flinch, Intimidate, or Scare.
shortDesc: Emanate + Inner Focus.

name: Peaceful Slumber
romDesc: Sweet Dreams restores 1/8 of maximum HP at the end of each turn when the user is asleep or has the Comatose ability. Additionally, it grants immunity to Bad Dreams damage. Restores 1/16 of the Pokemon's maximum HP at the end of each turn.
shortDesc: Sweet Dreams + Self Sufficient.

name: Aftershock
romDesc: After landing a damaging move, the user follows up with Magnitude at 10, 30, 50, or 70 power. Hits all adjacent Pokemon.
shortDesc: Triggers Magnitude 4-7 after using a damaging move.

name: Freezing Point
romDesc: Contact with this Pokemon has a 20% chance to inflict frostbite. Non-contact has a 30% chance. Works offensively and defensively. Frostbitten Pokemon lose 1/8th of their max HP each turn and have their Special Attack halved.
shortDesc: 20% chance to get frostbitten on contact and 30% non-contact.

name: Cryo Proficiency
romDesc: Contact with this Pokemon has a 30% chance to inflict frostbite. Non-contact has a 20% chance. Works offensively and defensively. Frostbitten Pokemon lose 1/8th of their max HP each turn and have their Special Attack halved.  Sets hail after receiving a hit. Immune to hail damage.
shortDesc: Freezing Point + triggers hail when hit.

name: Arcane Force
romDesc: Grants the 1.5x STAB damage bonus to all moves regardless of type matching. Does not boost moves that already receive a STAB bonus. Additionally, boosts the power of super effective moves by 10%.
shortDesc: All moves gain STAB. Ups “supereffective” by 10%.

name: Doombringer
romDesc: Uses Doom Desire on entry. Doom Desire is a Steel-type 140 base power and strikes the target two turns later, bypassing substitutes and other protections. The attack cannot miss once initiated and ignores accuracy checks. This cannot target the same Pokemon twice.
shortDesc: Uses Doom Desire on switch-in.

name: Wishmaker
romDesc: Uses Wish on entry, setting up delayed healing that restores half of the current ally's max HP on the following turn. Activates 3 times per battle.
shortDesc: Uses Wish on switch-in. Three uses per battle.

name: Yuki Onna
romDesc: Lowers both Attack and Special Attack of opposing Pokemon upon entry by one stage. Additionally provides a 30% chance to infatuate (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half) the target on contact. Works offensively and defensively. This only works on the opposite gender.
shortDesc: Scare + Intimidate. 30% chance to infatuate on hit.

name: Suppress
romDesc: Uses Torment on entry, preventing the opponent from using the same move consecutively.
shortDesc: Casts Torment on entry.

name: Refrigerator
romDesc: Reduces damage from super effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources. Boosts the user's accuracy by 1.2x. Removes Ghost-typing on target when landing an attack.
shortDesc: Filter + Illuminate.

name: Heaven Asunder
romDesc: Guarantees Spacial Rend always lands critical hits and increases critical hit ratio by one stage for all other moves.
shortDesc: Spacial Rend always crits. Ups crit level by +1.

name: Purifying Waters
romDesc: Uses Aqua Ring on entry, which restores 1/16 HP each turn. Grants immunity to burn status and removes burn on switching in. During rain, cures all status conditions at the end of the turn.
shortDesc: Hydration + Water Veil.

name: Seaborne
romDesc: Upon entry, sets rain weather for 8 turns. During rain, the user's Speed is boosted by 50%.
shortDesc: Drizzle + Swift Swim.

name: High Tide
romDesc: Triggers a 50 BP Surf after the user lands a Water-type attack, including status moves like Soak. Surf hits all adjacent Pokemon.
shortDesc: Triggers 50 BP Surf after using a Water-type move.

name: Change of Heart
romDesc: Uses Heart Swap on entry. Swaps stat stages with the Pokemon directly across from the user. Ignores accuracy checks.
shortDesc: Uses Heart Swap on switch-in.

name: Mystic Blades
romDesc: Keen Edge moves become Special (deal Special damage and use the Special Attack stat) and deal 30% more damage.
shortDesc: Keen edge moves become special and deal 30% more damage.

name: Determination
romDesc: Boosts Special Attack stat by 50% when the Pokemon has any status condition. Also prevents the frostbite status from reducing Special Attack.
shortDesc: Ups Special Attack by 50% if suffering.

name: Fertilize
romDesc: Changes the user's Normal-type moves to Grass-type. If the user is Grass-type its Grass-type moves heal for 10% of damage dealt, otherwise it gains Grass STAB.
shortDesc: Normal moves become Grass. Grass moves are empowered.

name: Pure Love
romDesc: 50% to infatuate on contact (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half). Heals 25% of damage dealt when attacking infatuated targets.
shortDesc: Cute Charm + heal 25% damage vs infatuated.

name: Fighter
romDesc: Boosts the power of Fighting- type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Fight.-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Mycelium Might
romDesc: Allows status moves to bypass all immunities and type resistances, but forces them to move last in their priority bracket.
shortDesc: Status moves ignore immunities but go last.

name: Telekinetic
romDesc: Casts Telekinesis on entry. All moves against the target cannot miss, but they become immune to Ground-type moves and other Grounded effects. Cannot affect Rooted Pokemon or if they hold Iron Ball. Wears off under Gravity or if they are hit by Smack Down. Lasts 3 turns.
shortDesc: Casts Telekinesis on entry.

name: Combustion
romDesc: Combustion increases the power of all Fire-type moves by 50%.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves by 1.5x.

name: Blade's Essence
romDesc: Keen Edge moves become Special (deal Special damage and use the Special Attack stat) and deal 30% more damage. Also gives another 30% to Keen Edge moves.
shortDesc: Keen Edge + Mystic Blades.

name: Powder Burst
romDesc: Uses Powder on entry, coating the target with explosive powder for the remainder of the turn. If the target uses any Fire-type move while coated, they lose 25% of their max HP and the powder is consumed.
shortDesc: Casts Powder on entry.

name: Retriever
romDesc: Retrieves original held item when switching out if not holding one. Must not be knocked out to activate.
shortDesc: Retrieves item on switch-out.

name: Monster Mash
romDesc: Casts Trick-or-Treat on entry, adding Ghost type to the target. They do not benefit from the effects of fog. The effect persists until the target switches out.
shortDesc: Casts Trick-or-Treat on entry.

name: Two Step
romDesc: After using a dance move, automatically follows up with a 50 BP Revelation Dance. The follow-up move matches the user's primary type.
shortDesc: Triggers 50BP Revelation Dance after using a Dance move.

name: Spiteful
romDesc: Spiteful reduces the attacker's PP by 4 when hit by contact moves. Targets the last move used by the attacker. Fails if the attacker has no remaining PP or hasn't used any moves yet.
shortDesc: Reduces attacker's PP on contact.

name: Fortitude
romDesc: When hit, raises the user's Special Defense by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Boosts SpDef +1 when hit. Maxes SpDef on crit.

name: Devourer
romDesc: Boosts biting moves by 30%. All biting moves to hit twice. The first hit deals 100% damage while the second hit deals 40% damage. Independently rolls secondary effects of attacks on each hit.
shortDesc: Strong Jaw + Primal Maw.

name: Phantom Thief
romDesc: Uses a 40 BP Spectral Thief (a Ghost-type move) when switching in, targeting the opponent across from the user. Steals all positive stat boosts (before dealing damage) from the target and applies them to the user. Cannot miss and ignores Substitute.
shortDesc: Attacks with 40BP Spectral Thief on switch-in.

name: Early Grave
romDesc: Ghost-type moves gain +1 priority when at full HP.
shortDesc: Ghost-type moves get +1 priority at max HP.

name: Grappler
romDesc: Trapping moves last 6 turns instead of 4-5 turns and increases their damage at the end of the turn to 1/6 max HP per turn.
shortDesc: Trapping moves last 6 turns. Trapping deals 1/6 HP.

name: Bass Boosted
romDesc: Boosts sound-based moves by 30%. Single-target sound moves gain spread targeting to hit both opposing Pokemon. Does not spread with multihit moves. Also boosts the user's sound moves by another 30% and reduces incoming sound move damage by 50%. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Amplifier + Punk Rock.

name: Flaming Jaws
romDesc: Biting moves a 50% chance to burn the target on hit. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Biting moves have 50% chance to burn the target.

name: Monster Hunter
romDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Dark-type Pokemon and takes 0.5x damage when attacked by Dark-type Pokemon. Based on attacker/defender Pokemon types, not move types. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Deals 1.5x damage to Dark. Takes 0.5x damage from Dark.

name: Crowned Sword
romDesc: Raises Attack by 1 stage upon switching in. When hit, raises the user's Attack by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Intrepid Sword + Anger Point.

name: Crowned Shield
romDesc: Raises Defense by 1 stage upon switching in. When hit, raises the user's Defense by 1 stage or maximizes it on critical hits. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Dauntless Shield + Stamina.

name: Berserk DNA
romDesc: Raises the user's highest attacking stat by 2 stages when it enters, but becomes enraged, adding 33% recoil to all attacks. Boost applies even if it can't become enraged.
shortDesc: Sharply ups highest attacking stat but enrages on entry.

name: Crowned King
romDesc: Prevents all opposing Pokemon from consuming held items. Raise Attack and Special Attack by one stage when the user knocks out an opponent with a direct attack.
shortDesc: Unnerve + Grim Neigh + Chilling Neigh.

name: Clap Trap
romDesc: When the user receives a contact move, counters with a 50 BP Snap Trap. This Steel-type move traps opponents for 4-5 turns while dealing 1/8 max HP damage.
shortDesc: Counters contact with 50BP Snap Trap.

name: Permanence
romDesc: Prevents all opposing Pokemon from healing through any means. Blocks healing moves like Recover, absorbing moves like Drain Punch, passive healing from Leftovers and abilities like Regenerator, and prevents health recovery from berries and other items.
shortDesc: Foes can't heal in any way.

name: Hubris
romDesc: Boosts the user's Special Attack by one stage whenever it knocks out an opponent with a direct hit.
shortDesc: KOs raise SpAtk by one stage.

name: Cosmic Daze
romDesc: Attacks against confused and enraged targets deal double damage. Additionally, confused and enraged enemies take twice as much damage when they hurt themselves from those statuses.
shortDesc: Deals 2x damage vs confused and enraged foes.

name: Mind’s Eye
romDesc: Mind's Eye allows Normal and Fighting-type moves to hit Ghost-type Pokemon with normal effectiveness. Additionally, this ability prevents the user's accuracy stat from being lowered by opposing moves or abilities.
shortDesc: Hits Ghost-type Pokémon. Accuracy can't be lowered.

name: Blood Price
romDesc: Blood Price boosts all attacking moves by 30%, but the user loses 10% of their max hp when landing an attack.
shortDesc: Does 30% more damage but lose 10% HP when attacking.

name: Spike Armor
romDesc: Spike Armor has a 30% chance to inflict bleeding on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked. Bleeding causes 1/16 max HP damage per turn, prevents healing, and negates the effects of stat stages. Rock and Ghost types are immune to bleeding.
shortDesc: 30% chance to bleed on contact or offense.

name: Voodoo Power
romDesc: 30% chance to bleed when hit by special attacks.
shortDesc: 30% chance to bleed when hit by special attacks.

name: Chrome Coat
romDesc: Chrome Coat reduces special damage by 40% but decreases Speed by 10%. Also triples the user's weight. The damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Reduces special damage taken by 40%, but decreases Speed by 10%.

name: Banshee
romDesc: Boosts the power of all sound- based moves by 20% and converts Normal-type sound moves to Ghost-type.
shortDesc: Sound moves get a 1.2x boost and become Ghost if Normal.

name: Web Spinner
romDesc: Uses String Shot on switch in, harshly lowering the Speed of all opponents by 2 stages.
shortDesc: Uses String Shot on switch-in.

name: Showdown Mode
romDesc: Guarantees a critical hit while also boosting the user's Attack by 20% and their Speed by 50% after switching in. Lasts one turn.
shortDesc: Ambush + Violent Rush.

name: Seed Sower
romDesc: Activates Grassy Terrain when the Pokemon takes damage from a direct attack, lasting 5 turns (8 with Terrain Extender). Also heals all party Pokemon's status conditions.
shortDesc: Sets Grassy Terrain when hit. Heals party status when it does.

name: Airborne
romDesc: Increases the power of Flying- type moves by 30% for both the user and its allies in battle.
shortDesc: Boosts own & ally's Flying-type moves by 1.3x.

name: Parroting
romDesc: When any Pokemon on the field uses a sound move, this Pokemon immediately uses the same move after. Triggers once per move.
shortDesc: Copies sound moves used by others.

name: Salt Circle
romDesc: Prevents all opposing Pokemon from fleeing or switching when user enters battle. Effect lasts until user leaves field. Forced switches and pivot moves like Flip Turn still work.
shortDesc: Prevents opposing pokemon from fleeing on entry.

name: Purifying Salt
romDesc: Immune to all status conditions. Additionally reduces all Ghost- type damage by 50%. If afflicted with status when gaining this ability, conditions are immediately cured.
shortDesc: Immune to status conditions. Take 1/2 damage from Ghost.

name: Protosynthesis
romDesc: Boosts the user's highest stat by 50% for Speed or 30% for other stats during sun. When sun ends, Booster Energy activates if held. This is considered a raw stat boost and not a stat raise. Cannot be copied, suppressed, or replaced unless by Simple Beam or Worry Seed.
shortDesc: Boosts highest stat in Sun or with Booster Energy.

name: Quark Drive
romDesc: Boosts the user's highest stat by 50% for Speed or 30% for other stats during electric terrain. When terrain ends, Booster Energy activates if held. This is considered a raw stat boost and not a stat raise. Cannot be copied, suppressed, or replaced unless by Simple Beam or Worry Seed.
shortDesc: Boosts highest stat in Electric Terrain or with Booster Energy.

name: Wind Power
romDesc: Gain Charged status when hit by wind-based moves or entering in during Tailwind. The Charged status doubles the power of Electric-type moves until used.
shortDesc: Charges up when hit by wind moves or Tailwind starts.

name: Impulse
romDesc: Non-contact moves use Speed stat for damage instead of Attack/Special Attack. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Non-contact moves use the Speed stat for damage.

name: Terminal Velocity
romDesc: Adds 20% of the user's Speed stat to damage when using non- contact moves. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Special moves use 20% of its Speed stat additionally.

name: Guard Dog
romDesc: Guard Dog prevents forced switching from moves and Red Card. When affected by Intimidate or Scare, it raises the stat by one stage instead of lowering it.
shortDesc: Can't be forced out. Inverts Intimidate effects.

name: Anger Shell
romDesc: When dropping to below 50% HP, the user triggers Shell Smash effects: raising Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by 2 stages each while lowering Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage each. Only activates once per battle. Activates at the last hit of multihit moves.
shortDesc: Applies Shell Smash when reduced below 1/2 HP.

name: Egoist
romDesc: Egoist copies stat boosts that enemy Pokemon receive and applies them to itself. Does not copy other Egoist boosts.
shortDesc: Raises its own stats when foes raise theirs.

name: Subdue
romDesc: Doubles the effectiveness of stat drops from moves. Does not affect self-inflicted stat drops or enemy abilities.
shortDesc: Doubles stat drop effects used by this pokemon.

name: Readied Action
romDesc: Increases the user's Attack stat by 2x for one turn. Multiplicative with other damage boosts. Reapplies after switching in.
shortDesc: Doubles attack on first turn.

name: Stygian Rush
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to Dark-type moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: Dark-type moves get +1 priority at max HP.

name: Guilt Trip
romDesc: The attacker that delivers the final blow on the user drops their Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. Only works when fainting from direct damage.
shortDesc: Sharply lowers attacker's Attack and SpAtk when fainting.

name: Tidal Rush
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to Water- type moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: Water-type moves get +1 priority at max HP.

name: Zero to Hero
romDesc: After switching out, transforms user into Hero Form on entry. Lasts until the end of battle. Cannot be suppressed, swapped, copied, or overridden.
shortDesc: Changes forms after switching out.

name: Costar
romDesc: Costar copies all stat stage changes (positive and negative) from the ally when switching in during doubles battles.
shortDesc: Copies its ally's stat changes on switch-in.

name: Commander
romDesc: Allows Tatsugiri to enter an allied Dondozo and become untargetable. Dondozo receives +2 to all stats, cannot switch or be forced out and Tatsugiri becomes unusable. If Dondozo faints, Tatsugiri reappears and can act normally again. Cannot be swapped, copied, or suppressed.
shortDesc: Hops inside an allied Dondozo. Boosts its ally but can't act.

name: Tactical Retreat
romDesc: Automatically switches the user out when any of its stats are lowered, including self drops. Triggers once per battle.
shortDesc: Flees when stats are lowered.

name: Vengeful Spirit
romDesc: Curses the attacker when knocked out by a direct hit. The curse inflicts 25% max HP damage per turn until the cursed Pokemon switches out or faints. Ghost-type attackers are immune to the curse. Boosts the power of Ghost-type moves by 30%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Haunted Spirit + Vengeance.

name: Cud Chew
romDesc: When consuming a berry, the user re-consumes it at the end of the following turn.
shortDesc: Eats berries again at the end of the next turn.

name: Armor Tail
romDesc: Prevents the user and its ally from being targeted by priority moves with priority higher than 0.
shortDesc: Protects itself and ally from priority moves.

name: Mind Crunch
romDesc: Biting moves use the Special Attack (still targets enemy's Defense unless stated otherwise) and deal 30% more damage.
shortDesc: Biting moves use SpAtk and deal 30% more damage.

name: Supreme Overlord
romDesc: Boosts Attack and Special Attack by 10% for each fainted ally on your side, capped at 5 allies maximum for a 50% boost to both stats. Stacks additively with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: Each fainted ally increases Attack and SpAtk by 10%.

name: Ill Will
romDesc: Ill Will drains the PP of the move that defeats the user. Has to be a direct hit.
shortDesc: Deletes the PP of the move that faints this Pokemon.

name: Fire Scales
romDesc: Halves all incoming special attack damage. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Halves damage taken by Special moves. Does NOT double SpDef.

name: Watch Your Step
romDesc: Spreads two layers of Spikes on switch-in.
shortDesc: Spreads two layers of Spikes on switch-in.

name: Rapid Response
romDesc: The user gains a 50% Speed boost and 20% Special Attack boost on their first turn after switching in.
shortDesc: Boosts Speed by 50% + SpAtk by 20% on first turn.

name: Sharp Edges
romDesc: Damages attackers using contact moves for 1/6 of their max HP. Activates on every hit for multihitting moves.
shortDesc: 1/6 HP damage when touched.

name: Thermal Exchange
romDesc: Boosts Attack by one stage when hit by Fire-type moves and grants immunity to burn status. The Attack boost applies immediately after taking damage from any Fire attack. Activates on each hit of a multihit move.
shortDesc: Ups Attack when hit by Fire. Immune to burn.

name: Good as Gold
romDesc: Good As Gold grants immunity to all status moves that directly target this Pokemon. Remains vulnerable to status moves that affect the entire field, such as Haze.
shortDesc: Immune to all Status moves, unless whole field is affected.

name: Sharing Is Caring
romDesc: All stat changes are shared between all battlers on the field, both positive and negative.
shortDesc: Stat changes are shared between all battlers.

name: Tablets of Ruin
romDesc: Reduces the Attack stat of every other Pokemon by 25% while the user is out. Multiples of the same Ruin ability do not stack together. Stacks multiplicatively with Attack drops.
shortDesc: Lowers the Attack of other Pokemon by 25%.

name: Sword of Ruin
romDesc: Reduces the Defense stat of every other Pokemon by 25% while the user is out. Multiples of the same Ruin ability do not stack together. Stacks multiplicatively with Defense drops.
shortDesc: Lowers the Defense of other Pokemon by 25%.

name: Vessel of Ruin
romDesc: Reduces the Special Attack stat of every other Pokemon by 25% while the user is out. Multiples of the same Ruin ability do not stack together. Stacks multiplicatively with Special Attack drops.
shortDesc: Lowers the Special Attack of other Pokemon by 25%.

name: Beads of Ruin
romDesc: Reduces the Special Defense stat of every other Pokemon by 25% while the user is out. Multiples of the same Ruin ability do not stack together. Stacks multiplicatively with Special Defense drops.
shortDesc: Lowers the Special Defense of other Pokemon by 25%.

name: Thick Skin
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 35% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Gallantry
romDesc: Negates the first instance of damage received. Moves still connect and secondary effects apply, but damage becomes 0.
shortDesc: Gets no damage for first hit.

name: Orichalcum Pulse
romDesc: Sets sun on entry for 8 turns (12 with Heat Rock). While sun is active, boosts the user's Attack by 33%.
shortDesc: Summons sun on entry. Raises Atk by 1.33x in sun.

name: Sun Basking
romDesc: Blocks priority moves and reduces physical attack damage by 50% in sun. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Blocks priority and reduces physical damage by 1/2 in sun.

name: Winged King
romDesc: Super effective attacks are boosted by 33%.
shortDesc: Ups “supereffective” by 33%.

name: Hadron Engine
romDesc: Sets electric terrain on entry for 8 turns (12 with Terrain Extender). While terrain is active, boosts the user's Special Attack by 33%.
shortDesc: Field becomes Electric. +33% SpAtk in Electric Terrain.

name: Iron Serpent
romDesc: Super effective attacks are boosted by 33%.
shortDesc: Ups “supereffective” by 33%.

name: Catastrophe
romDesc: In Sun, Water moves gain the damage boost they receive from rain. In Rain, Fire moves gain the damage boost they receive from sun.
shortDesc: Sun boosts Water. Rain boosts Fire.

name: Blademaster
romDesc: Makes all Keen Edge moves never miss and hit both opposing Pokemon in double battles. Multihit moves will only hit each target one time. Also boosts Keen Edge moves by 30%.
shortDesc: Sweeping Edge + Keen Edge.

name: Celestial Blessing
romDesc: Restores 1/12 of the user's maximum HP at the end of each turn while under Misty Terrain.
shortDesc: Recovers 1/12 of its health each turn under Misty Terrain.

name: Minion Control
romDesc: Moves hit an additional time for every healthy party member (max 6 hits). Members that are knocked out or have a status effect will not be counted. The first hit deals full damage while each additional hit deals 10% damage. Each hit rolls secondary effects independently.
shortDesc: Moves hit an extra time for each healthy party member.

name: Molten Blades
romDesc: Keen Edge moves are boosted by 30% and have a 20% chance to burn on hit.
shortDesc: Keen Edge + Keen Edge moves have a 20% chance to burn.

name: Haunting Frenzy
romDesc: Attacks have a 20% chance to flinch. Upon defeating an enemy with a direct hit, the user gains +1 Speed.
shortDesc: 20% chance to flinch the opponent. +1 speed on kill.

name: Noise Cancel
romDesc: Prevents the user and its ally from being targeted by sound moves.
shortDesc: Protects the party from sound-based moves.

name: Radio Jam
romDesc: 20% chance to disable the last move used by the target after landing a sound move. Lasts 4 turns.
shortDesc: Sound-based moves have a 20% chance to inflict disable.

name: Olé!
romDesc: Reduces the accuracy of all single-target moves aimed at the user by 20%. Spread moves such as Heat Wave retain normal accuracy.
shortDesc: 20% chance to evade single-target moves.

name: Malicious
romDesc: On switch-in, lowers all opposing Pokemon's highest offensive stat (Attack or Special Attack) and highest defensive stat (Defense or Special Defense) by 1 stage each.
shortDesc: Lowers the foe's highest Attack and Defense stat.

name: Dead Power
romDesc: Boosts the user's Attack stat by 50% and 20% chance to inflict curse on contact moves. Curse inflicts 25% max HP damage per turn until the cursed Pokemon switches out or faints. The Attack boost is multiplicative with other damage boosts.
shortDesc: 1.5x Attack boost. 20% chance to curse on contact moves.

name: Brawling Wyvern
romDesc: Guarantees hits for all moves used by and against the user. Dragon-type moves are treated as punching moves.
shortDesc: No guard + Dragon type moves become punching moves.

name: Mythical Arrows
romDesc: Arrow moves moves become Special (deal Special damage and use the Special Attack stat) and deal 30% more damage.
shortDesc: Arrow moves become special and deal 30% more damage.

name: Lawnmower
romDesc: On switch-in, removes any active terrain and gains a stat boost: Defense +1 when removing Grassy or Electric Terrain, Special Defense +1 when removing Misty, Psychic, or Toxic Terrain.
shortDesc: Removes terrain on switch-in. Stat up if terrain removed.

name: Flourish
romDesc: Boosts Grass-type moves by 50% when Grassy Terrain is active.
shortDesc: Boosts Grass moves by 50% in grassy terrain.

name: Desert Spirit
romDesc: Summons sandstorm on entry, lasting 8 turns (12 with Smooth Stone). During sandstorm, the user's Ground-type moves bypass immunity and hit airborne Pokemon with normal effectiveness. The user is immune to sandstorm damage.
shortDesc: Summons sand on entry. Ground moves hit airborne in sand.

name: Contempt
romDesc: Ignores all the foes' stat stage changes during damage calculations. When the user has their stats lowered by another Pokemon, they raise their Attack by 2 stages.
shortDesc: Unaware + Defiant.

name: Aerialist
romDesc: The user is immune to Ground- type moves and other ground effects such as Spikes and terrains. Boosts the damage of Flying-type moves by 25%. Additionally, boosts the power of Flying-type moves by another 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Levitate + Flock.

name: Tera Shell
romDesc: At full HP, all attacks towards the user deal not very effective damage regardless of type effectiveness. Activates on each hit of a multihit attack unlike other similar abilities.
shortDesc: All hits will be not very effective while at full HP.

name: Toxic Chain
romDesc: The user has a 30% to badly poison the target after landing any move. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Moves have a 30% chance to badly poison the foe.

name: Parasitic Spores
romDesc: Gain parasitic spores on entry. Each turn, affected Pokemon lose 1/8 max HP (Ghost types immune). When using contact moves, spread spores to the target. Spores persist until switch-out.
shortDesc: Deals 1/8 HP damage to non-Ghost. Spreads on contact.

name: Poison Puppeteer
romDesc: When the user applies poison, they also apply confusion. Does not activate from Toxic Spikes.
shortDesc: Poison also inflicts confusion.

name: Entrance
romDesc: When the user confuses an opponent, it also infatuates them (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half) if they are the opposite gender.
shortDesc: Confusion also inflicts infatuation.

name: Rejection
romDesc: Casts Quash on entry. Quash nullifies most Speed altering effects, including Tailwind, Trick Room, positive priority, Speed stat raises, etc. Negative priority works as normal. Lasts 5 turns.
shortDesc: Applies Quash on switch-in.

name: Apple Enlightenment
romDesc: Halves all incoming physical attack damage. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction. Also grants immunity to all non-attack damage sources including entry hazards, weather damage, status conditions, and recoil.
shortDesc: Fur coat + Magic Guard.

name: Balloon Bomb
romDesc: Uses a 100 BP Explosion or Outburst (whichever is higher) when knocked out. Using explosion moves will always Flinch the target. When hit by any Fire or Flying moves, boost Defense and Special Defense by one stage each. Activates on each hit of a multihit move. Boost applies after the hit lands.
shortDesc: Aftermath + Inflatable

name: Flaming Maw
romDesc: Biting moves moves are boosted by 30% and have a 50% chance to burn the target on hit. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Strong Jaw + Flaming Jaws

name: Demolitionist
romDesc: Increases the user's Attack stat by 2x, breaks screens, and ignores Protection effects for one turn. Multiplicative with other damage boosts. Reapplies after switching in.
shortDesc: Readied Action + Ignores Protect + screens break on readied turn

name: Rockhard Will
romDesc: Boosts the power of Rock-type moves by 20%, or by 50% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Rock-type moves by 1.2x, or 1.5x when under 1/3 HP.

name: Fragrant Daze
romDesc: 30% chance to inflict confusion on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked.
shortDesc: 30% chance to confuse on contact.

name: Low Visibility
romDesc: Summons Eerie Fog upon entry, lasting 8 turns (12 with Smoke Ball). Fog reduces stat buffs from non-Ghost/Psychic-types by 1 each turn, halves weather- based recovery, grants Ghost/Psychic-types +20% damage reduction from moves, and turns all Curses into the Ghost- type Curse.
shortDesc: Summons Eerie Fog on entry.

name: Old Mariner
romDesc: If user is Grass-type, they take half damage from Fire-type attacks and deals 2x damage to Fire-type Pokemon with Grass- type moves. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction. Grants STAB to Water- type moves regardless of the user's typing. Also provides immunity to being drenched.
shortDesc: Seaweed + Water STAB.

name: Ectoplasm
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's highest attacking stat by 50% during fog.
shortDesc: Ups highest attacking stat by 1.5x in fog.

name: Beautiful Music
romDesc: Sound moves gain 50% chance to infatuate targets on hit (cuts their Attack and Special Attack in half).
shortDesc: Sound moves have 50% chance to infatuate, ignoring gender.

name: Surprise!
romDesc: In fog, counters priority moves with Astonish, a 40 BP Ghost- type attack with +3 priority and always flinches. This ability will activate before the opponent's priority move comes out.
shortDesc: Astonishes enemy priority users in fog.

name: Snow Song
romDesc: Boosts the power of all sound- based moves by 20% and converts Normal-type sound moves to Ice- type.
shortDesc: Sound moves get a 1.2x boost and become Ice if Normal.

name: Greater Spirit
romDesc: When entering battle during fog, boosts the user's highest stat by one stage.
shortDesc: Ups highest stat by +1 on entry in fog.

name: Resonance
romDesc: Sound moves have a 50% chance to inflict bleeding on the target when landing a hit. Bleeding causes 1/16 max HP damage per turn, prevents healing, and negates the effects of stat stages. Rock and Ghost types are immune to bleeding.
shortDesc: Sound moves have a 30% chance to cause bleeding.

name: Ethereal Rush
romDesc: Boosts the Pokemon's Speed stat by 50% during fog.
shortDesc: This Pokémon's Speed gets a 1.5x boost in fog.

name: Pretty Privilege
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to Fairy-type moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: At full HP, gives +1 priority to its Fairy-type moves.

name: Shallow Grave
romDesc: After fainting while fog is active, the user revives at 25% max Hp when sending out your next party member. This still activates when the user faints on the last turn of fog being active.
shortDesc: Revives at 25% HP once after fainting in fog.

name: Menacing Situation
romDesc: Has a 30% chance to inflict Fear on contact moves, both when attacking and being attacked. Fear traps the target for 2 turns and they take 50% more damage. If forced out by moves like Whirlwind, the target loses Fear.
shortDesc: 30% chance to Fear on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Shiny Lightning
romDesc: Boosts the user's accuracy by 1.2x, and Thunder never misses.
shortDesc: Grants a 1.2x accuracy boost. Thunder never misses.

name: Terrify
romDesc: Upon entering battle, the user drops the Special Attack stat of all opposing Pokemon by two stages.
shortDesc: Lowers foes' Sp. Atk by two stages on entry.

name: Ice Downfall
romDesc: When hit by a contact move, the user retaliates with Icicle Crash at 60 base power. Icicle Crash has a 20% chance to flinch.
shortDesc: Counters contact with 60BP Icicle Crash.

name: Last Stand
romDesc: Defense and Special Defense increase linearly as HP decreases. Multiplier scales from 1.0x at full HP to 1.6x at 0% HP. At 50% HP provides 1.3x boost, at 25% HP provides 1.45x boost.
shortDesc: Def and SpDef increase as HP drops. Max 1.6x.

name: Pyroclastic Flow
romDesc: Makes Fire-type moves super effective against Rock-types instead of resisted. Poison-type moves become super effective against Steel-type Pokemon. Additionally, this Pokemon can inflict poison status on any type.
shortDesc: Molten Down + Corrosion.

name: Blood Bath
romDesc: Immunity to the bleeding. When this Pokemon successfully inflicts bleeding on an opponent, it also gains Fear. Fear traps the target for 2 turns and they take 50% more damage. If forced out by moves like Whirlwind, the target loses Fear.
shortDesc: Immune to bleed. Inflict fear when inflicting bleed.

name: Battle Aura
romDesc: Increases each Pokemon's critical hit stage by +2. Includes both allies and opponents.
shortDesc: Boosts each battler's crit rate by +2.

name: Bloodlust
romDesc: Immunity to the bleeding. When this Pokemon successfully inflicts bleeding on an opponent, it also gains Fear. Fear traps the target for 2 turns and they take 50% more damage. If forced out by moves like Whirlwind, the target loses Fear. Also recovers 25% of max HP when scoring a direct KO.
shortDesc: Blood Bath + Soul Eater.

name: Piercing Solo
romDesc: When landing a sound move, the user inflicts bleeding. Bleeding causes 1/16 max HP damage per turn, prevents healing, and negates the effects of stat stages. Rock and Ghost types are immune to bleeding.
shortDesc: Sound moves cause bleeding.

name: Rhythmic
romDesc: Each consecutive use of the same move increases damage by 10%. No maximum cap. Resets when switching moves or when moves fail.
shortDesc: Deals 10% more damage for each repeated move use.

name: Chunky Bass Line
romDesc: After landing any sound move, the user follows up with a 40 BP Earthquake that hits all adjacent Pokemon.
shortDesc: Triggers a 40BP Earthquake after using a sound move.

name: Jackhammer
romDesc: Hammer moves to hit twice, with each hit dealing 70% of the move's normal damage. Secondary effects roll independently for each hit (except flinch).
shortDesc: Super Slammer moves hit twice for 70% damage.

name: Denting Blows
romDesc: Lowers the target's Defense by one stage when hitting with Hammer attacks. Each target can only be affected once per turn. The Defense drop occurs after damage.
shortDesc: Hammer moves lower Defense.

name: Ice Cold Hunter
romDesc: Ice-type moves hit twice in hail for full damage on both hits. User is immune to hail damage. Both hits apply secondary effects independently (except flinch).
shortDesc: Ice-type moves hit twice in hail.

name: Soul Crusher
romDesc: Hammer moves gain a 10% damage boost and target Special Defense instead of Defense.
shortDesc: Hammer moves hit SpDef and get a 1.1x power boost.

name: Arc Flash
romDesc: When the user attacks, it has a 50% chance to paralyze the target upon contact. When receiving damage, it has a 50% chance to burn the attacker.
shortDesc: 50% chance to burn when hit or paralyze when dealing damage.

name: Unicorn
romDesc: Boosts the power of horn and drill-based attacks by 30%. Converts Normal-type moves to Fairy-type and Fairy STAB. If the user is Fairy-type its Fairy moves have a 10% infatuate chance.
shortDesc: Mighty Horn + Pixilate.

name: On the Prowl
romDesc: All moves with priority 0 or higher gain +1 priority on the user's first turn. Negative priority moves become priority 0 instead of adding +1 priority.
shortDesc: +1 priority for the first turn. Negative priority becomes +0.

name: Pretentious
romDesc: Boosts the user's critical hit ratio by one stage whenever it knocks out an opponent with a direct hit.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO raises Crit by one stage.

name: Venoblaze Pincers
romDesc: Boosts all physical moves by 20% damage and they have a 20% chance to either inflict Burn or Poison on contact.
shortDesc: 1.2x boost to physical moves and 20% chance to Burn or Poison.

name: Eternal Blessing
romDesc: Restores 1/12 of the user's maximum HP at the end of each turn while under Misty Terrain. Also restores 33% of maximum HP when switching out. This heal is not blocked by Heal Block.
shortDesc: Celestial Blessing + Regenerator.

name: Sugar Rush
romDesc: When consuming or losing a held item, the user's base Speed stat is multiplied by x2. Boost goes away when switching out, gaining a new item, or upon losing the ability. Doubles all beneficial berry effects.
shortDesc: Unburden + Ripen

name: Rest in Peace
romDesc: Restores 1/8 of the user's maximum HP at the end of each turn while in fog.
shortDesc: Heals 1/8 of max HP every turn in fog.

name: White Noise
romDesc: Has a chance to paralyze when attacking or when hit by a move. Has a 10% chance to paralyze on non-contact attacks and a 30% chance to paralyze on contact attacks. Restores 1/8 of the user's maximum HP at the end of each turn while in fog.
shortDesc: Static + Rest in Peace.

name: Smokey Maneuvers
romDesc: Fog reduces incoming move accuracy targeting the user by 25%.
shortDesc: Evasion is boosted by 1.25x in fog.

name: Tag
romDesc: When an enemy attempts to switch out, automatically trigger a 20 BP Pursuit to prevent them from leaving.
shortDesc: Attacks switching opponents with a 20BP Pursuit.

name: Power Metal
romDesc: Boosts the power of all sound- based moves by 20% and converts Normal-type sound moves to Steel-type.
shortDesc: Sound moves get a 1.2x boost and become Steel if Normal.

name: Power Edge
romDesc: Keen Edge moves gain a 30% damage boost and target Special Defense instead of Defense.
shortDesc: Keen Edge moves target Special Defense and get a 1.3x boost.

name: Superconductor
romDesc: All Steel-type moves become Electric-type instead and receive a 10% power boost.
shortDesc: Steel-type moves become Electric and get a 1.1x boost.

name: Ultra Instinct
romDesc: Reduces all damage by 20%. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources. Counters contact moves with Vacuum Wave at 20 BP.
shortDesc: Counters contact with 20BP Vacuum Wave. Takes .8x damage.

name: Unlocked Potential
romDesc: Focus Blast never misses. Unaffected by flinch, Intimidate, or Scare. When the user drops to half HP or below from an opposing attack, boosting its highest attacking stat by one stage. Triggers only once per battle. Other damage sources that bring you to half HP or below will not activate it.
shortDesc: Inner Focus + Berserk.

name: Higher Rank
romDesc: Moves with increased priority (+1 or higher) receive a 20% damage boost.
shortDesc: Priority moves get a 1.2x boost.

name: Funeral Pyre
romDesc: Non-Ghost and Dark-types take 1/4 damage every turn.
shortDesc: Non-Ghost and Dark-types take 1/4 damage every turn.

name: Flame Bubble
romDesc: Water Bubble + Flaming Soul.
shortDesc: Water Bubble + Flaming Soul.

name: Elemental Vortex
romDesc: Immune to Fire and Water-type moves. When hit by a Fire move, boosts the power of those moves my 50% until switching out. When hit by a Water move, restores 25% of the user's max HP.
shortDesc: Flash Fire + Water Absorb.

name: Snowy Wrath
romDesc: Summons hail for 8 turns (12 with Icy Rock) when entering battle. Hail damages non-Ice types by 1/16 HP per turn and boosts the Defense stat of Ice-types on the field by 50%. Multiplies the chance of inflicting frostbite by 5x on all moves. Does not interact with Freezing Point.
shortDesc: Snow Warning + Cryomancy.

name: Pattern Change
romDesc: Before each attack, the user overrides their type to match their move's type. At the end of each turn, there's a 30% chance for the user to cure status conditions afflicted on them.
shortDesc: Protean + Shed Skin

name: No Turning Back
romDesc: When HP drops to half or below for the first time, all stats increase by one stage and the user becomes unable to switch out or flee. Normal ways to bypass this effects such as Eject Button or Shed Shell still allow switching out.
shortDesc: Boosts all stats but can't retreat when below 1/2 max HP.

name: Flammable Coat
romDesc: Transforms Lumbering Sloth into its Engulfed form when hit by Fire-type moves or when using Fire-type moves. Cannot be copied or suppressed.
shortDesc: Changes forms when using or hit by a Fire-type move.

name: Draco Morale
romDesc: Upon entering battle, automatically uses Dragon Cheer, boosting critical hit rate by one stage for you and your ally. Dragon-type Pokemon receive two stages instead.
shortDesc: Uses Dragon Cheer on switch-in.

name: Bad Omen
romDesc: Opponents deal minimum damage rolls when attacking, forcing 85% damage instead of 85-100% variance. Critical hits against this Pokemon deal only 25% of their normal damage instead of 150-200%.
shortDesc: Foes min roll. Takes 1/4 damage from crits.

name: Mosh Pit
romDesc: Boosts ally attacks by 25%, or by 50% if it is a recoil move. The user receives no boost.
shortDesc: Ally's attacks get a 1.25x boost. 1.5x if attack causes recoil.

name: Blood Stain
romDesc: Pokemon with this ability gain an unremovable bleed status condition. When the user makes contact offensively or defensively with another Pokemon who does not have this ability, it replaces their current ability and causes bleeding.
shortDesc: Is always bleeding if not immune. Spreads on contact.

name: Blood Stigma
romDesc: Deal double damage to targets inflicted with bleeding and the user is immune to status effects.
shortDesc: Immune to status. Gets a 2x boost vs bleeding foes.

name: Max Acceleration
romDesc: User's Speed increases by one stage at end of each full turn they remain on the field. Doesn't activate on the turn the user is switched in. Adds 20% of the user's Speed stat to damage when using attacks. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Speed Boost + Slipstream.

name: Sidewinder
romDesc: On entry, gives +1 priority to the first biting move used. Priority boost is consumed after landing any biting move. Upon scoring a direct KO, regains priority buff.
shortDesc: First biting move each entry gets +1 priority. Resets on KO.

name: Petrify
romDesc: Removes stat raises from opposing Pokemon, then drops their Speed by 1 stage.
shortDesc: Clears stat buffs then lowers speed by one stage on entry.

name: Fluffiest
romDesc: Reduces damage from contact moves by 75%. Fire-type moves to deal x4 damage to the user. Multiplicative with other forms of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Quarters contact damage taken. 4x weak to fire.

name: Way of Precision
romDesc: Focus Blast never misses. Unaffected by flinch, Intimidate, or Scare. Punching moves gain +1 critical hit stage and 5x their normal secondary effect chance.
shortDesc: Inner Focus + Precise Fist.

name: Way of Swiftness
romDesc: Boosts the user's critical hit ratio by one stage whenever it knocks out an opponent with a direct hit. Boosts the Pokemon's Speed by 50% during rain.
shortDesc: Pretentious + Swift Swim.

name: Atomic Punch
romDesc: Iron Fist + 30% Steel type damage.
shortDesc: Iron Fist + 30% Steel type damage.

name: Iron Giant
romDesc: Halves damage from Fire-type moves. Immune to burn damage and Attack drops from burn status. Boosts contact moves by adding 20% of the user's Defense stat to attack calculations. Prevents paralysis and immediately cures the status if inflicted on the user.
shortDesc: Heatproof + Juggernaut.

name: Master Hand
romDesc: Boosts pulse, beam, ball, and aura moves by 30%. Eliminates recharge turns when the user successfully KOs an opponent with a direct attack.
shortDesc: Mega Launcher + Rampage.

name: Final Blow
romDesc: Allows all contact moves to bypass protection moves and ignore any secondary effects associated with them. Super- effective damaging moves never miss and always land critical hits.
shortDesc: Unseen Fist + Fatal Precision.

name: Hospitality
romDesc: When this Pokemon switches into battle, it heals its ally for 25% of their max HP.
shortDesc: Heals partner for 25% of its max HP on switch-in.

name: Butter Up
romDesc: On entry, heals all status conditions from every Pokemon in the user's party, including both active and benched Pokemon; and heals its ally for 25% of their max HP.
shortDesc: Hospitality + Soothing Aroma

name: Vitality Strike
romDesc: When dealing damage with punching moves, recover HP equal to 10% of damage dealt.
shortDesc: Heals for 10% of the damage dealt by punching moves.

name: Imposing Wings
