romDesc: Boosts the power of all wing, wind, and air-based moves by 30%. The user is immune to Ground- type moves and other ground effects such as Spikes or terrains, and boosts the power of Flying-type moves by 25%.
shortDesc: Giant Wings + Levitate.

name: Sword of Damnation
romDesc: Reduces the Defense stat of every other Pokemon by 25% while the user is out. Multiples of the same Ruin ability do not stack together. Ignores all the foes' stat stage changes during damage calculations.
shortDesc: Unaware + Sword of Ruin.

name: Restraining Order
romDesc: When the user is hit by a contact move, they force the attacker to switch out to a random ally. Once per switch in.
shortDesc: Forces the attacker out when hit, once each switch-in.

name: Assassin's Tools
romDesc: When the user lands contact moves, there's a 30% chance of inflicting poison, paralysis, or bleeding on the target, chosen randomly. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Contact moves have a 30% chance to PSN, PRLZ, or BLD.

name: Frostmaw
romDesc: Biting moves a 50% chance to burn the target on hit. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Biting moves have a 50% chance to inflict frostbite.

name: Patchwork
romDesc: Blocks the first damaging move that hits the Pokemon and changes its form after. Only non-status moves are blocked. In fog, the disguise is restored immediately once per switch in, or when fog is set again. When the disguise breaks, the attacker becomes cursed.
shortDesc: Disguise + curses the opponent when its Disguise breaks.

name: Blind Rage
romDesc: The user can land Normal and Fighting-type moves on Ghost- types for neutral damage. Grants immunity to Intimidate and Scare. Allows moves to ignore the target's abilities and innates that interfere with effects or reduce damage. Does not bypass abilities that modify base stats such as Grass Pelt.
shortDesc: Scrappy + Mold Breaker.

name: Slipstream
romDesc: Adds 20% of the user's Speed stat to damage when using attacks. Choice Scarf does not affect this ability.
shortDesc: Moves use 20% of its Speed stat additionally.

name: Apex Predator
romDesc: Contact moves are boosted by 30%. When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP.
shortDesc: Tough Claws + Predator.

name: Dragon's Ritual
romDesc: Boosts the user's Attack and Speed by one stage each whenever it knocks out an opponent with a direct hit.
shortDesc: Dealing a KO raises Attack and Speed by one stage.

name: Pinnacle Blade
romDesc: All Keen Edge moves can never miss, and they bypass protection moves and ignore any secondary effects associated with them.
shortDesc: Slashing moves always hit and break protection and barriers.

name: Energized
romDesc: Charges up the user once upon switching in, doubling Electric- type move power for the next Electric attack. Recharge when Electric Terrain becomes active during battle. Charged state is lost upon switching out or after using an Electric move. Recharges when scoring a direct KO with an Electric move.
shortDesc: Generator + charges up on KO with an Electric-type move.

name: Color Spectrum
romDesc: STAB moves are boosted by 20%. The user changes to a random Pure type at the start of every turn.
shortDesc: Same-type attacks get a 1.2x boost. Changes type each turn.

name: Steel Beetle
romDesc: Causes punching moves to hit twice, with the first hit at 100% power and second hit at 40% power. Normal-type moves become Bug-type and gain STAB. If the user is Bug-type it is immune to powder moves.
shortDesc: Raging Boxer + Pollinate.

name: From the Shadows
romDesc: When the user moves first in a turn, attacks gain a 20% chance to flinch and trap the target on hit. The trap effect applies regardless of flinch success. Flinch chance only works on the first hit of multihit moves.
shortDesc: Attacks trap and have a 20% flinch chance when moving first.

name: Rage Point
romDesc: Boosts offensive moves by 50% while the user has any status condition. When the Pokemon takes a critical hit, both Attack and Special Attack are raised by one stage. Also negates burn's Attack drop and freeze's Special Attack drop.
shortDesc: Gets a 1.5x boost while statused. Raises offenses when crit.

name: Hot Coals
romDesc: Sets a burning trap on the opponent's side when the user switches in. The next opposing Pokemon that switches in will be burned if they are grounded and can be burned. Consumed when triggered. Does not stack multiple traps.
shortDesc: Sets a trap that burns the next foe that switches in.

name: Terastal Treasure
romDesc: Reduces incoming damage by 40% while lowering the Pokemon's Speed by 20%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Reduces damage taken by 40%, but lowers speed by 20%.

name: Shocking Maw
romDesc: Boosts the power of biting and fang moves by 30% and they have a 50% chance to paralyze the target on hit.
shortDesc: Strong Jaw + Bite moves have 50% paralysis chance.

name: Gleam Eyes

shortDesc: Frisk + Scare.

name: Megabite
romDesc: Biting moves use the Special Attack (still targets enemy's Defense unless stated otherwise) and deal 30% more damage.
shortDesc: Biting moves use SpAtk and deal 30% more damage.

name: Dream State
romDesc: Incoming damage is reduced by 20% (x0.8), multiplicative with other damage reduction. Additionally, critical hits are blocked, functioning as regular hits and not activating on-crit effects like To The Bone's bleed.
shortDesc: Immune to critical hits. Takes 20% less damage from attacks.

name: Dream Whimsy
romDesc: Uses Yawn on switch in, targeting the opposing Pokemon. Yawn causes drowsiness that makes the target fall asleep at the end of the next turn. The sleep effect can be prevented by switching out.
shortDesc: Uses Yawn on switch-in.

name: Lunar Affinity
romDesc: Copies lunar moves when other Pokemon use them in battle. Includes Moonlight, Moonblast, Lunar Dance, and Lunar Blessing. Triggers once per move.

name: Flame Shield
romDesc: Reduces damage from super- effective attacks by 35%. Multiplicative with other sources of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 35% less damage from Super-effective moves.

name: Aquatic Dweller
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Water to the user's current typing. Retains Water typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out. Also boosts the power of Water-type moves by 50%.
shortDesc: Aquatic + Boosts the power of Water-type moves by 1.5x.

name: Apple Pie
romDesc: Restores 1/16 of the Pokemon's maximum HP at the end of each turn. Ripen doubles all beneficial berry effects. Healing berries restore twice as much HP, stat-boosting berries raise stats by 2 stages, resist berries reduce super-effective damage by 75%, and PP-restoring berries restore 20 PP.
shortDesc: Self Sufficient + Ripen.

name: Hover
romDesc: Upon entering battle, adds Psychic to the user's current typing. Retains Psychic typing even upon losing the ability, going away only when switching out. The user is immune to Ground-type moves and other ground effects such as Spikes and terrains.
shortDesc: Adds Psychic type to itself. Avoids Ground attacks.

name: Depravity

name: Wildfire

name: Jumpscare
romDesc: Uses Astonish on switch in, a 40 BP Ghost-type Physical move with +3 priority that always causes flinching. Once per battle.
shortDesc: Attacks with Astonish on first switch-in.

name: Tar Toss
romDesc: Uses Tar Shot on switch in, lowering the target's Speed by one stage and making them take double damage from Fire-type moves. Does not stack the Fire- type damage debuff on successive uses.
shortDesc: Uses Tar Shot on switch-in.

name: Stun Shock
romDesc: When the user lands an attack, there's a 60% chance of inflicting poison or paralysis, chosen randomly. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Attacks have a 60% chance to Paralyze or Poison.

name: Raging Goddess
romDesc: Eliminates recharge turns when the user successfully KOs an opponent with a direct attack. Makes all attacks hit twice in succession. The first hit deals 100%, while the second hit deals 25%. Each hit rolls secondary effects independently (except flinch).

name: Whiplash
romDesc: Lowers the target's Defense by one stage when hitting with physical attacks. Each target can only be affected once per turn. The Defense drop occurs after damage.
shortDesc: Physical attacks lower defense.

name: Supersweet Syrup
romDesc: The user's item cannot be forcibly removed or stolen. When making contact, the opponent's item is disabled for 2 turns.
shortDesc: Sticky Hold + Disables foe's item for 2 turns on contact.

name: Lucky Halo
romDesc: Prevents self-inflicted stat drops on the user and allows them to survive an attack that would KO them one time, leaving them with 1 HP.
shortDesc: Negates self stat drops. Endures the a single KO.

name: Trash Heap
romDesc: Poison-type moves become super effective against Steel-type Pokemon. Additionally, this Pokemon can inflict poison status on any type. Damages all non-Poison-type Pokemon by 1/8 HP each turn. Pokemon with Poison Heal recover instead. Disappears when the user leaves.
shortDesc: Corrosion + Toxic Spill.

name: Sludgy Mix
romDesc: Converts all Normal-type moves into Poison-type moves and grants STAB for Poison-type moves. If the user is Poison-type their Poison moves have 10% toxic chance. Amplifies the user's sound moves by 30% and reduces incoming sound move damage by 50%. Damage reduction is multiplicative with other sources.
shortDesc: Intoxicate + Punk Rock.

name: Overwatch
romDesc: All moves with priority 0 or higher gain +1 priority on the user's first turn. Negative priority moves become priority 0 instead of adding +1 priority. Deals double damage to opponents that just switched in. Only works right after they switch in for 1 turn.
shortDesc: On the Prowl + Stakeout.

name: Wind Rage
romDesc: Uses Defog on switch in. Lowers the opponent's evasion by one stage and clears all entry hazards, screens, Safeguard, and Mist. Additionally, all air-based moves receive a 1.3x damage boost.
shortDesc: Uses Defog on switch-in. Air-based moves get a 1.3x boost.

name: Victory Bomb
romDesc: When fainting, retaliate with a 100 BP Fire-type Explosion targeting all adjacent Pokemon. Cannot miss. Works regardless of how the user. was KOed.
shortDesc: Attacks with a 100BP Fire-type Explosion on fainting.

name: Razor Sharp
romDesc: Inflict bleed when landing a critical hit. Bleeding causes 1/16 max HP damage per turn, prevents healing, and negates the effects of stat stages. Rock and Ghost types are immune to bleeding.
shortDesc: Critical hits also inflict bleeding.

name: To The Bone
romDesc: Critical hits get a 1.5x boost and inflict bleeding.
shortDesc: Critical hits get a 1.5x boost and inflict bleeding.

name: Blade Dance
romDesc: Triggers a 50 BP Leaf Blade (Grass-type, Physical) follow-up attack immediately after using any dance move.
shortDesc: Triggers 50 BP Leaf Blade after using a dance move.

name: Taekkyeon
romDesc: Makes all non-status moves count as dance moves, triggering abilities like Dancer and interactions with dance-based effects.
shortDesc: All attacks are dances.

name: Ape Shift
romDesc: Transforms the Pokemon when HP drops to 50% or below, automatically curing all status conditions after transformation. After transforming, all attacks become critical hits. Activates on entry, during battle, and at turn end.
shortDesc: Transforms below 50% HP, curing status and always critting.

name: Know Your Place
romDesc: Landing contact moves causes the target to always move last regardless of priority, speed, or other effects for 5 turns. Effect does not stack or refresh on already afflicted targets.
shortDesc: Contact attacks make foes move last for 5 turns.

name: Deep Cuts
romDesc: Keen Edge have a 50% chance to inflict bleeding on hit. Bleeding causes 1/16 max HP damage per turn, prevents healing, and negates the effects of stat stages. Rock and Ghost types are immune to bleeding.immune to bleeding. Multihits roll the activation chance on each hit.
shortDesc: Slashing moves have a 50% chance to inflict bleeding.

name: Life Steal
romDesc: Drains 1/10 of each active opponent's max HP at the end of every turn and restores that amount to the user. Ignores Substitute.
shortDesc: Steals 1/10 HP from foes each turn.

name: Rude Awakening
romDesc: Upon awakening, the user permanently gains immunity to sleep status and boosts all stats by one stage. Once per battle.
shortDesc: Raises all stats becomes immune to sleep after waking up.

name: Teraform Zero
romDesc: At full HP, all attacks towards the user deal not very effective damage regardless of type effectiveness. Activates on each hit of a multihit attack unlike other similar abilities. On entry, clears normal weathers and terrains.
shortDesc: Tera Shell + clears weather and terrain on first entry.

name: Set Ablaze
romDesc: When the user applies burn, they also apply fear. Fear traps the target for 2 turns and they take 50% more damage. If forced out by moves like Whirlwind, the target loses Fear.
shortDesc: Inflicting burn also inflicts fear.

name: Breakwater
romDesc: Boosts Speed by 50% during rain. Reduces damage by 30% when moving before the opponent. Works when the user switches in mid-turn.
shortDesc: Swift Swim + Stall.

name: Magical Fists
romDesc: Punching moves use the Special Attack (still targets enemy's Defense unless stated otherwise) and deal 30% more damage.
shortDesc: Punching moves use Special Attack and get a 1.3x boost.

name: Cutthroat
romDesc: On entry, gives +1 priority to the first Keen Edge move used. Priority boost is consumed after landing any Keen Edge move. Resets ability if Sharpen is used.
shortDesc: The first slicing move used on each entry in gets +1 priority.

name: Sand Bender
romDesc: Summons sandstorm on entry, lasting 8 turns (12 with Smooth Stone). Boosts the Pokemon's highest attacking stat by 50% during sandstorm. Also grants immunity to sandstorm damage.
shortDesc: Sand Stream + Sand Force.

name: Sand Pit
romDesc: Uses Sand Tomb with 20 BP on switch in. Hits all opposing Pokemon and traps them for 4-5 turns, making them lose 1/8 max HP each turn. Cannot miss and ignores accuracy checks.
shortDesc: Attacks with 20BP Sand Tomb on switch-in.

name: Desolate Sun
romDesc: Creates extremely harsh sunlight that lasts until the user switches out. Has the standard sun effects and nullifies all Water-type moves. Additionally, the user heals 25% of their max HP when hit by Ground-type moves instead of taking damage.
shortDesc: Desolate Land + Earth Eater.

name: Daybreak
romDesc: The user burns the foe on contact. Works on offense and defense.
shortDesc: Burns the foe on contact. Also works on offense.

name: Energy Siphon
romDesc: Heals the user for 25% of all damage they deal to opponents. Healing occurs immediately after damage is dealt. Minimum healing of 1 HP.
shortDesc: Heals the user for 1/4 of the damage they deal.

name: Reservoir
romDesc: The user is draws in Water-type moves and gain immunity to them. Additionally, Water-type moves boost the highest attacking stat of the user by one stage and heal for 25% of their max HP when absorbing them.
shortDesc: Water Absorb + Storm Drain.

name: Neurotoxin
romDesc: When inflicting poison on an opponent, drop their Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage immediately after it applies.
shortDesc: Inflicting poison also lowers Attack, SpAtk, and Speed.

name: Energy Horns
romDesc: Horn moves become Special (deal Special damage and use the Special Attack stat) and deal 30% more damage.
shortDesc: Mighty horn moves become special and deal 30% more damage.

name: Rising Dough
romDesc: Sets Sticky Web on opponent's field when the user enters battle. Lasts 7 turns and lowers Speed by 1 stage for any grounded Pokemon switching in. Cannot activate if Sticky Web is already present on opponent's field.
shortDesc: Casts Sticky Web on entry. Lasts 7 turns.

name: Crust Coat
romDesc: Incoming damage is reduced by 20% (x0.8), multiplicative with other damage reduction. Additionally, critical hits are blocked, functioning as regular hits and not activating on-crit effects like To The Bone's bleed.
shortDesc: Immune to critical hits. Takes 20% less damage from attacks.

name: Puffy
romDesc: Reduces damage from contact moves by 50%. Fire-type moves to deal double damage to the user. Multiplicative with other forms of damage reduction.
shortDesc: Takes 1/2 dmg from contact moves but Fire moves hurt it 2x more.

name: Balloon Blitz
romDesc: When hit by any Fire or Flying moves, boost Defense and Special Defense by one stage. Activates on each hit of a multihit move. Boost applies after the hit lands. All attacks hit twice. First hit deals 100%, while the second deals 25%. Each hit rolls secondary effects independently (except flinch).
shortDesc: Inflatable + Hyper Aggressive.

name: Twinkle Toes
romDesc: Increases the power of all kicking moves by 30%. Normal- type moves become Fairy-type and the user gains Fairy STAB. If the user is Fairy-type their Fairy-type moves get 10% infatuate chance.
shortDesc: Boosts the power of kicking moves by 1.3x + Pixilate.

name: Doom Blast
romDesc: Boosts Dark-type moves by 35% but causes 10% recoil damage based on damage dealt (minimum 1 HP). The recoil damage will not knock out the user.
shortDesc: Dark-type moves deal 1.35x damage but have 10% recoil.

name: Brute Force
romDesc: Increases the damage of moves that cause recoil by 20%. While enraged, this boost applies to all moves. Prevents all recoil damage from the user's moves and abilities. Also grants immunity to enrage recoil damage. Does not prevent crash damage or Explosion/Self-Destruct damage.
shortDesc: Rock Head + Reckless

name: Faraday Cage
romDesc: Incoming damage is reduced by 20%, multiplicative with other damage reduction. Critical hits are blocked. Uses Thunder Cage when hit by contact moves, a 50 BP Electric-type Special move that traps the opponent for 4-5 turns. The target takes 1/8 max HP damage each turn and cannot switch out.
shortDesc: Shell Armor + 50BP Thunder Cage when hit by contact.

name: Acidic Slime
romDesc: Poison-type moves become super effective against Steel-type Pokemon. Additionally, this Pokemon can inflict poison status on any type. Also gives STAB to Poison-type moves.
shortDesc: Corrosion + Poison STAB.

name: Rose Garden
romDesc: Spreads two layers of Toxic Spikes on the opponent's side on entry. Any non-Poison or Steel- type grounded enemy that switches in will be badly poisoned.
shortDesc: Spreads two layers of Toxic Spikes on switch-in.

name: Qigong
romDesc: The user always lands their moves. Converts all Normal-type moves into Fighting-type moves and grants STAB on Fighting-type attacks. If the user is Fighting- type their Fighting-type moves break screens. Eliminates recharge turns when the user successfully KOs an opponent with a direct attack.
shortDesc: Always hits. Fighting Spirit + Rampage.

name: Conjurer Of Deceit
romDesc: Grants immunity to all non- attack damage sources including entry hazards, weather damage, status conditions, and recoil. Reflects most status moves back to the user before they can take effect. Reflected moves target the original user. Does not reflect moves that were already reflected.
shortDesc: Magic Guard + Magic Bounce

name: Deep Freeze
romDesc: Boosts the damage of Water and Ice-type moves by 25%. Halves damage received from Fire-type moves. Multiplicative with other damage reduction sources.
shortDesc: Boosts Water and Ice by 1.25x. Halves Fire damage taken.

name: Soul Devourer
romDesc: When the user knocks out an opponent with a direct hit, it immediately recovers 25% of its maximum HP. Removes Normal-type immunity to Ghost-type moves, allowing Ghost attacks to hit Normal-type Pokemon for 1x effectiveness.
shortDesc: Soul Eater + Phantom Pain

name: Champion's Entrance
romDesc: Upon entering battle, the user drops the Attack stat of all opposing Pokemon by one stage. The user gains a 50% Speed boost and 20% Attack boost on their first turn after switching in.
shortDesc: Intimidate + Violent Rush

name: Presto
romDesc: Grants +1 priority to sound moves when at full HP.
shortDesc: Sound moves get +1 priority at full HP.

name: Samba
romDesc: Increases the power of all kicking moves by 30%. Includes Pyro Ball. When any Pokemon on the field uses a dance move, this Pokemon immediately uses the same move after. Triggers once per move.

name: JunshiSanda
romDesc: Punching moves are also treated as kicking moves, benefiting from Striker-type abilities. Kicking moves are also treated as punching moves, benefiting from Iron Fist-type abilities.
shortDesc: Punches and Kicks are both Punches and Kicks.

name: Gladiator
romDesc: Boosts the power of Fighting- type moves by 30%, or by 80% at 1/3 HP or lower.
shortDesc: Boosts Fighting-type moves by 1.3x, or 1.8x when below 1/3 HP.

name: Forsaken Heart
romDesc: Raises Attack by one stage when any Pokemon faints on the battlefield, including allies and enemies.
shortDesc: KOs dealt anywhere on the field raise Attack by one stage.

name: Relentless
romDesc: When attacking a statused opponent, deals 1.25x damage and automatically targets their lower defensive stat. Guarantees critical hits against targets who are poisoned, paralyzed, bleeding, or have their speed lowered.
shortDesc: Exploit Weakness + Merciless

name: Soothsayer
romDesc: On entry, all attacks received by the user are considered not very effective for 3 turns. Deactivates when switching out.
shortDesc: Resists all attacks for three turns on first entry.

name: Corrupted Mind
romDesc: Psychic-type moves bypass type resistances and immunities, hitting for at least neutral damage regardless of the target's typing. Additionally, all secondary effects of Psychic moves have their activation chance increased by 40%.
